  "filePath": "/workspace/test/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl_test.h",
  "newString": "ListenerOrchestrator",
  "oldString": "ListenerManagerImpl",
  "originalFile": "#pragma once\n\n#include <memory>\n\n#include \"envoy/admin/v3/config_dump.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener_components.pb.h\"\n\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/listener_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/network/listen_socket_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/network/socket_option_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/server/configuration_impl.h\"\n\n#include \"test/mocks/network/mocks.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/drain_manager.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/guard_dog.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/instance.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/listener_component_factory.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/worker.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/worker_factory.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/stream_info/mocks.h\"\n#include \"test/server/utility.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/environment.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/simulated_time_system.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/test_runtime.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/threadsafe_singleton_injector.h\"\n\n#include \"gmock/gmock.h\"\n#include \"gtest/gtest.h\"\n\nusing testing::_;\nusing testing::InSequence;\nusing testing::NiceMock;\nusing testing::Return;\nusing testing::ReturnRef;\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\n\nclass ListenerHandle {\npublic:\n  ListenerHandle(bool need_local_drain_manager = true) {\n    if (need_local_drain_manager) {\n      drain_manager_ = new MockDrainManager();\n      EXPECT_CALL(*drain_manager_, startParentShutdownSequence()).Times(0);\n    }\n  }\n  ~ListenerHandle() { onDestroy(); }\n\n  MOCK_METHOD(void, onDestroy, ());\n\n  Init::ExpectableTargetImpl target_;\n  MockDrainManager* drain_manager_{};\n  Configuration::FactoryContext* context_{};\n};\n\nclass ListenerManagerImplTest : public testing::TestWithParam<bool> {\npublic:\n  // reuse_port is the default on Linux for TCP. On other platforms even if set it is disabled\n  // and the user is warned. For UDP it's always the default even if not effective.\n  static constexpr ListenerComponentFactory::BindType default_bind_type =\n#ifdef __linux__\n      ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort;\n#else\n      ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort;\n#endif\n\nprotected:\n  ListenerManagerImplTest()\n      : listener_factory_ptr_(std::make_unique<NiceMock<MockListenerComponentFactory>>()),\n        listener_factory_(*listener_factory_ptr_),\n        api_(Api::createApiForTest(server_.api_.random_)), use_matcher_(GetParam()) {}\n\n  void SetUp() override {\n    ON_CALL(server_, api()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(*api_));\n    ON_CALL(*server_.server_factory_context_, api()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(*api_));\n    EXPECT_CALL(worker_factory_, createWorker_()).WillOnce(Return(worker_));\n    ON_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor())\n        .WillByDefault(ReturnRef(validation_visitor));\n    ON_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor())\n        .WillByDefault(ReturnRef(validation_visitor));\n    manager_ = std::make_unique<ListenerManagerImpl>(server_, std::move(listener_factory_ptr_),\n                                                     worker_factory_, enable_dispatcher_stats_,\n                                                     server_.quic_stat_names_);\n\n    // Use real filter loading by default.\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, createNetworkFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke(\n            [this](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>& filters,\n                   Server::Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) {\n              return ProdListenerComponentFactory::createNetworkFilterFactoryListImpl(\n                  filters, filter_chain_factory_context, network_config_provider_manager_);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, getTcpListenerConfigProviderManager())\n        .WillByDefault(Return(&tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, getQuicListenerConfigProviderManager())\n        .WillByDefault(Return(&quic_listener_config_provider_manager_));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenerFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke(\n            [this](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>&\n                       filters,\n                   Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context)\n                -> Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList {\n              return THROW_OR_RETURN_VALUE(\n                  ProdListenerComponentFactory::createListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\n                      filters, context, *listener_factory_.getTcpListenerConfigProviderManager()),\n                  Filter::ListenerFilterFactoriesList);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, createUdpListenerFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(\n            Invoke([](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>&\n                          filters,\n                      Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context)\n                       -> std::vector<Network::UdpListenerFilterFactoryCb> {\n              return THROW_OR_RETURN_VALUE(\n                  ProdListenerComponentFactory::createUdpListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(filters,\n                                                                                       context),\n                  std::vector<Network::UdpListenerFilterFactoryCb>);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, createQuicListenerFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke(\n            [this](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>&\n                       filters,\n                   Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context)\n                -> Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList {\n              return THROW_OR_RETURN_VALUE(\n                  ProdListenerComponentFactory::createQuicListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\n                      filters, context, *listener_factory_.getQuicListenerConfigProviderManager()),\n                  Filter::QuicListenerFilterFactoriesList);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(listener_factory_, nextListenerTag()).WillByDefault(Invoke([this]() {\n      return listener_tag_++;\n    }));\n\n    local_address_ = std::make_shared<Network::Address::Ipv4Instance>(\"127.0.0.1\", 1234);\n    remote_address_ = std::make_shared<Network::Address::Ipv4Instance>(\"127.0.0.1\", 1234);\n    EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, close(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(Api::SysCallIntResult{0, errno}));\n    EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getsockname)\n        .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([this](os_fd_t sockfd, sockaddr* addr, socklen_t* addrlen) {\n          return os_sys_calls_actual_.getsockname(sockfd, addr, addrlen);\n        }));\n    EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getaddrinfo(_, _, _, _))\n        .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([&](const char* node, const char* service,\n                                   const struct addrinfo* hints, struct addrinfo** res) {\n          return os_sys_calls_actual_.getaddrinfo(node, service, hints, res);\n        }));\n    socket_ = std::make_unique<NiceMock<Network::MockConnectionSocket>>();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * This routing sets up an expectation that does various things:\n   * 1) Allows us to track listener destruction via filter factory destruction.\n   * 2) Allows us to register for init manager handling much like RDS, etc. would do.\n   * 3) Stores the factory context for later use.\n   * 4) Creates a mock local drain manager for the listener.\n   */\n  ListenerHandle* expectListenerCreate(bool need_init, bool added_via_api,\n                                       envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener::DrainType drain_type =\n                                           envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener::DEFAULT) {\n    if (added_via_api) {\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor());\n    } else {\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor());\n      EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n    }\n    auto raw_listener = new ListenerHandle();\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createDrainManager_(drain_type))\n        .WillOnce(Return(raw_listener->drain_manager_));\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createNetworkFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillOnce(Invoke(\n            [raw_listener, need_init](\n                const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>&,\n                Server::Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) {\n              std::shared_ptr<ListenerHandle> notifier(raw_listener);\n              raw_listener->context_ = &filter_chain_factory_context;\n              if (need_init) {\n                filter_chain_factory_context.initManager().add(notifier->target_);\n              }\n\n              Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList factories;\n              factories.push_back(\n                  std::make_unique<Config::TestExtensionConfigProvider<Network::FilterFactoryCb>>(\n                      [notifier](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {}));\n              return factories;\n            }));\n\n    return raw_listener;\n  }\n\n  ListenerHandle* expectListenerOverridden(bool need_init, ListenerHandle* origin = nullptr) {\n    auto raw_listener = new ListenerHandle(false);\n    // Simulate ListenerImpl: drain manager is copied from origin.\n    if (origin != nullptr) {\n      raw_listener->drain_manager_ = origin->drain_manager_;\n    }\n    // Overridden listener is always added by api.\n    EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n    EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor());\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createNetworkFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillOnce(Invoke(\n            [raw_listener, need_init](\n                const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>&,\n                Server::Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) {\n              std::shared_ptr<ListenerHandle> notifier(raw_listener);\n              raw_listener->context_ = &filter_chain_factory_context;\n              if (need_init) {\n                filter_chain_factory_context.initManager().add(notifier->target_);\n              }\n\n              Filter::NetworkFilterFactoriesList factories;\n              factories.push_back(\n                  std::make_unique<Config::TestExtensionConfigProvider<Network::FilterFactoryCb>>(\n                      [notifier](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {}));\n              return factories;\n            }));\n\n    return raw_listener;\n  }\n\n  const Network::FilterChain*\n  findFilterChain(uint16_t destination_port, const std::string& destination_address,\n                  const std::string& server_name, const std::string& transport_protocol,\n                  const std::vector<std::string>& application_protocols,\n                  const std::string& source_address, uint16_t source_port,\n                  std::string direct_source_address = \"\") {\n    if (absl::StartsWith(destination_address, \"/\")) {\n      local_address_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(destination_address);\n    } else {\n      local_address_ =\n          Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressNoThrow(destination_address, destination_port);\n    }\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setLocalAddress(local_address_);\n\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setRequestedServerName(server_name);\n    ON_CALL(*socket_, requestedServerName()).WillByDefault(Return(absl::string_view(server_name)));\n    ON_CALL(*socket_, detectedTransportProtocol())\n        .WillByDefault(Return(absl::string_view(transport_protocol)));\n    ON_CALL(*socket_, requestedApplicationProtocols())\n        .WillByDefault(ReturnRef(application_protocols));\n\n    if (absl::StartsWith(source_address, \"/\")) {\n      remote_address_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(source_address);\n    } else {\n      remote_address_ = Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressNoThrow(source_address, source_port);\n    }\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setRemoteAddress(remote_address_);\n\n    if (direct_source_address.empty()) {\n      direct_source_address = source_address;\n    }\n    if (absl::StartsWith(direct_source_address, \"/\")) {\n      direct_remote_address_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(direct_source_address);\n    } else {\n      direct_remote_address_ =\n          Network::Utility::parseInternetAddressNoThrow(direct_source_address, source_port);\n    }\n    socket_->connection_info_provider_->setDirectRemoteAddressForTest(direct_remote_address_);\n\n    return manager_->listeners().back().get().filterChainManager().findFilterChain(*socket_,\n                                                                                   stream_info_);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Validate that createListenSocket is called once with the expected options.\n   */\n  void\n  expectCreateListenSocket(const envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::SocketState& expected_state,\n                           Network::Socket::Options::size_type expected_num_options,\n                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type = default_bind_type,\n                           uint32_t worker_index = 0) {\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, bind_type, _, worker_index))\n        .WillOnce(\n            Invoke([this, expected_num_options, &expected_state](\n                       const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&, Network::Socket::Type,\n                       const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr& options,\n                       ListenerComponentFactory::BindType, const Network::SocketCreationOptions&,\n                       uint32_t) -> Network::SocketSharedPtr {\n              EXPECT_NE(options.get(), nullptr);\n              EXPECT_EQ(options->size(), expected_num_options);\n              EXPECT_TRUE(Network::Socket::applyOptions(options, *listener_factory_.socket_,\n                                                        expected_state));\n              return listener_factory_.socket_;\n            }))\n        .RetiresOnSaturation();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Validate that setSocketOption() is called the expected number of times with the expected\n   * options.\n   */\n  void expectSetsockopt(int expected_sockopt_level, int expected_sockopt_name, int expected_value,\n                        uint32_t expected_num_calls = 1) {\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_,\n                setSocketOption(expected_sockopt_level, expected_sockopt_name, _, sizeof(int)))\n        .Times(expected_num_calls)\n        .WillRepeatedly(Invoke(\n            [expected_value](int, int, const void* optval, socklen_t) -> Api::SysCallIntResult {\n              EXPECT_EQ(expected_value, *static_cast<const int*>(optval));\n              return {0, 0};\n            }));\n  }\n\n  void checkStats(int line_num, uint64_t added, uint64_t modified, uint64_t removed,\n                  uint64_t warming, uint64_t active, uint64_t draining,\n                  uint64_t draining_filter_chains) {\n    SCOPED_TRACE(line_num);\n\n    EXPECT_EQ(added, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_added\").value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(modified, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_modified\").value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(removed, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_removed\").value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(warming, server_.stats_store_\n                           .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_listeners_warming\",\n                                  Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                           .value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(active, server_.stats_store_\n                          .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_listeners_active\",\n                                 Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                          .value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(draining, server_.stats_store_\n                            .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_listeners_draining\",\n                                   Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                            .value());\n    EXPECT_EQ(draining_filter_chains, server_.stats_store_\n                                          .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_filter_chains_draining\",\n                                                 Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                                          .value());\n  }\n\n  void checkConfigDump(\n      const std::string& expected_dump_yaml,\n      const Matchers::StringMatcher& name_matcher = Matchers::UniversalStringMatcher()) {\n    auto message_ptr =\n        server_.admin_.config_tracker_.config_tracker_callbacks_[\"listeners\"](name_matcher);\n    const auto& listeners_config_dump =\n        dynamic_cast<const envoy::admin::v3::ListenersConfigDump&>(*message_ptr);\n    envoy::admin::v3::ListenersConfigDump expected_listeners_config_dump;\n    TestUtility::loadFromYaml(expected_dump_yaml, expected_listeners_config_dump);\n    EXPECT_EQ(expected_listeners_config_dump.DebugString(), listeners_config_dump.DebugString());\n  }\n\n  bool addOrUpdateListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& config,\n                           const std::string& version_info = \"\", bool added_via_api = true) {\n    // Automatically inject a matcher that always matches \"foo\" if not present.\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener;\n    listener.MergeFrom(config);\n    if (use_matcher_ && !listener.has_filter_chain_matcher()) {\n      const std::string filter_chain_matcher = R\"EOF(\n        matcher_tree:\n          input:\n            name: port\n            typed_config:\n              \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationPortInput\n          exact_match_map:\n            map:\n              \"10000\":\n                action:\n                  name: foo\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: foo\n        on_no_match:\n          action:\n            name: foo\n            typed_config:\n              \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n              value: foo\n      )EOF\";\n      TestUtility::loadFromYaml(filter_chain_matcher, *listener.mutable_filter_chain_matcher());\n    }\n    auto status_or_error = manager_->addOrUpdateListener(listener, version_info, added_via_api);\n    if (status_or_error.status().ok()) {\n      return status_or_error.value();\n    }\n    throw EnvoyException(std::string(status_or_error.status().message()));\n  }\n\n  void testListenerUpdateWithSocketOptionsChange(const std::string& origin,\n                                                 const std::string& updated,\n                                                 bool multiple_addresses = false) {\n    InSequence s;\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n    ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n    auto socket = std::make_shared<testing::NiceMock<Network::MockListenSocket>>();\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_origin = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    if (multiple_addresses) {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .Times(2)\n          .WillRepeatedly(Return(socket));\n    } else {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .WillOnce(Return(socket));\n    }\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_origin->target_, initialize());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(origin)));\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0);\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n    listener_origin->target_.ready();\n    worker_->callAddCompletion();\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_updated = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    if (multiple_addresses) {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .Times(2)\n          .WillRepeatedly(Return(socket));\n    } else {\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n          .WillOnce(Return(socket));\n    }\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_updated->target_, initialize());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(updated)));\n\n    // Should be both active and warming now.\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners(ListenerManager::WARMING).size());\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners(ListenerManager::ACTIVE).size());\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 0);\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_updated, onDestroy());\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_origin, onDestroy());\n  }\n\n  void testListenerUpdateWithSocketOptionsChangeRejected(const std::string& origin,\n                                                         const std::string& updated,\n                                                         const std::string& message) {\n    InSequence s;\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n    ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n    auto socket = std::make_shared<testing::NiceMock<Network::MockListenSocket>>();\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_origin = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0))\n        .WillOnce(Return(socket));\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_origin->target_, initialize());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(origin)));\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0);\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n    listener_origin->target_.ready();\n    worker_->callAddCompletion();\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n    ListenerHandle* listener_updated = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_updated, onDestroy());\n    EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(updated)), EnvoyException,\n                              message);\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_origin, onDestroy());\n  }\n\n  NiceMock<Api::MockOsSysCalls> os_sys_calls_;\n  TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls_{&os_sys_calls_};\n  Api::OsSysCallsImpl os_sys_calls_actual_;\n  NiceMock<MockInstance> server_;\n  class DumbInternalListenerRegistry : public Singleton::Instance,\n                                       public Network::InternalListenerRegistry {\n  public:\n    MOCK_METHOD(Network::LocalInternalListenerRegistry*, getLocalRegistry, ());\n  };\n  std::shared_ptr<DumbInternalListenerRegistry> internal_registry_{\n      std::make_shared<DumbInternalListenerRegistry>()};\n\n  std::unique_ptr<NiceMock<MockListenerComponentFactory>> listener_factory_ptr_;\n  NiceMock<MockListenerComponentFactory>& listener_factory_;\n  NiceMock<ProtobufMessage::MockValidationVisitor> validation_visitor;\n  MockWorker* worker_ = new MockWorker();\n  NiceMock<MockWorkerFactory> worker_factory_;\n  std::unique_ptr<ListenerManagerImpl> manager_;\n  NiceMock<MockGuardDog> guard_dog_;\n  Event::SimulatedTimeSystem time_system_;\n  Api::ApiPtr api_;\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr local_address_;\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr remote_address_;\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr direct_remote_address_;\n  NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\n  std::unique_ptr<Network::MockConnectionSocket> socket_;\n  uint64_t listener_tag_{1};\n  bool enable_dispatcher_stats_{false};\n  NiceMock<testing::MockFunction<void()>> callback_;\n  // Test parameter indicating whether the unified filter chain matcher is enabled.\n  bool use_matcher_;\n  Filter::NetworkFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl network_config_provider_manager_;\n  Filter::TcpListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_;\n  Filter::QuicListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl quic_listener_config_provider_manager_;\n};\n} // namespace Server\n} // namespace Envoy\n",

\"test/test_common/registry.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/utility.h\"\n\n#include \"absl/strings/escaping.h\"\n#include \"absl/strings/match.h\"\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\nnamespace {\n\nusing testing::ByMove;\nusing testing::InSequence;\nusing testing::Return;\nusing testing::ReturnRef;\nusing testing::Throw;\n\n// For internal listener test only.\nSINGLETON_MANAGER_REGISTRATION(internal_listener_registry);\n\nclass ListenerManagerImplWithDispatcherStatsTest : public ListenerManagerImplTest {\nprotected:\n  ListenerManagerImplWithDispatcherStatsTest() { enable_dispatcher_stats_ = true; }\n};\n\nclass ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest : public ListenerManagerImplTest {\npublic:\n  void SetUp() override {\n    ListenerManagerImplTest::SetUp();\n    ASSERT_NE(nullptr, server_.singletonManager().getTyped<Network::InternalListenerRegistry>(\n                           \"internal_listener_registry_singleton\",\n                           [registry = internal_registry_]() { return registry; }));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Create an IPv4 listener with a given name.\n   */\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener createIPv4Listener(const std::string& name) {\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(R\"EOF(\n      address:\n        socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1111 }\n      filter_chains:\n      - filters: []\n        name: foo\n    )EOF\");\n    listener.set_name(name);\n    return listener;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Used by some tests below to validate that, if a given socket option is valid on this platform\n   * and set in the Listener, it should result in a call to setsockopt() with the appropriate\n   * values.\n   */\n  void testSocketOption(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& listener,\n                        const envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::SocketState& expected_state,\n                        const Network::SocketOptionName& expected_option, int expected_value,\n                        uint32_t expected_num_options = 1,\n                        ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type =\n                            ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoReusePort) {\n    if (expected_option.hasValue()) {\n      expectCreateListenSocket(expected_state, expected_num_options, bind_type);\n      expectSetsockopt(expected_option.level(), expected_option.option(), expected_value,\n                       expected_num_options);\n      addOrUpdateListener(listener);\n      EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n    } else {\n      EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(listener), EnvoyException,\n                                \"MockListenerComponentFactory: Setting socket options failed\");\n      EXPECT_EQ(0U, manager_->listeners().size());\n    }\n  }\n};\n\nclass ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest : public Event::SimulatedTimeSystem,\n                                                           public ListenerManagerImplTest {\npublic:\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener createDefaultListener() {\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto;\n    Protobuf::TextFormat::ParseFromString(R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address: {\n      socket_address: {\n        address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n        port_value: 1234\n      }\n    }\n    filter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\",\n                                          &listener_proto);\n    return listener_proto;\n  }\n\n  void expectAddListener(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& listener_proto,\n                         ListenerHandle*) {\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n    addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\n    worker_->callAddCompletion();\n    EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n  }\n\n  Network::MockListenSocket*\n  expectUpdateToThenDrain(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& new_listener_proto,\n                          ListenerHandle* old_listener_handle,\n                          OptRef<Network::MockListenSocket> socket,\n                          ListenerComponentFactory::BindType bind_type = default_bind_type) {\n    Network::MockListenSocket* new_socket;\n    if (socket.has_value()) {\n      new_socket = new NiceMock<Network::MockListenSocket>();\n      EXPECT_CALL(socket.value().get(), duplicate())\n          .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(std::unique_ptr<Network::Socket>(new_socket))));\n    } else {\n      new_socket = listener_factory_.socket_.get();\n      EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, bind_type, _, 0));\n    }\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, stopListener(_, _, _));\n    EXPECT_CALL(*old_listener_handle->drain_manager_, startDrainSequence(_));\n\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(new_listener_proto));\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeListener(_, _));\n    old_listener_handle->drain_manager_->drain_sequence_completion_();\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*old_listener_handle, onDestroy());\n    worker_->callRemovalCompletion();\n    return new_socket;\n  }\n\n  void expectRemove(const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& listener_proto,\n                    ListenerHandle* listener_handle, Network::MockListenSocket& socket) {\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, stopListener(_, _, _));\n    EXPECT_CALL(socket, close());\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_handle->drain_manager_, startDrainSequence(_));\n    EXPECT_TRUE(manager_->removeListener(listener_proto.name()));\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeListener(_, _));\n    listener_handle->drain_manager_->drain_sequence_completion_();\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_handle, onDestroy());\n    worker_->callRemovalCompletion();\n  }\n};\n\nclass MockLdsApi : public LdsApi {\npublic:\n  MOCK_METHOD(std::string, versionInfo, (), (const));\n};\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, EmptyFilter) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(&manager_->httpContext(), &server_.httpContext());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(std::chrono::milliseconds(15000),\n            manager_->listeners().front().get().listenerFiltersTimeout());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, DefaultListenerPerConnectionBufferLimit) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1024 * 1024U, manager_->listeners().back().get().perConnectionBufferLimitBytes());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, DuplicatePortNotAllowed) {\n  const std::string yaml1 = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  const std::string yaml2 = R\"EOF(\nname: bar\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2)), EnvoyException,\n      \"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address '127.0.0.1:1234' as existing listener\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, DuplicateNonIPAddressNotAllowed) {\n  const std::string yaml1 = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  pipe:\n    path: /path\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  const std::string yaml2 = R\"EOF(\nname: bar\naddress:\n  pipe:\n    path: /path\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2)), EnvoyException,\n      \"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address '/path' as existing listener\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleAddressesDuplicatePortNotAllowed) {\n  const std::string yaml1 = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.1\n      port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  const std::string yaml2 = R\"EOF(\nname: bar\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.3\n      port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0)).Times(2);\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address \"\n                            \"'127.0.0.1:1234,127.0.0.3:1234' as existing listener\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest,\n       MultipleAddressesDuplicatePortNotAllowedWithZeroPortAndNonBind) {\n  const std::string yaml1 = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 0\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.2\n      port_value: 0\nbind_to_port: false\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  const std::string yaml2 = R\"EOF(\nname: bar\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 0\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.3\n      port_value: 0\nbind_to_port: false\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener: 'bar' has duplicate address \"\n                            \"'127.0.0.1:0,127.0.0.3:0' as existing listener\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, AllowCreateListenerWithMutipleZeroPorts) {\n  const std::string yaml1 = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 0\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.2\n      port_value: 0\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  const std::string yaml2 = R\"EOF(\nname: bar\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 0\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.2\n      port_value: 0\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0)).Times(2);\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml1));\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0)).Times(2);\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2));\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SetListenerPerConnectionBufferLimit) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\nper_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 8192\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(8192U, manager_->listeners().back().get().perConnectionBufferLimitBytes());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsTransportSocket) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  transport_socket:\n    name: tls\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n      common_tls_context:\n        tls_certificates:\n        - certificate_chain:\n            filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n          private_key:\n            filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n        validation_context:\n          trusted_ca:\n            filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n          match_subject_alt_names:\n            exact: localhost\n            exact: 127.0.0.1\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TransportSocketConnectTimeout) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  transport_socket_connect_timeout: 3s\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain->transportSocketConnectTimeout(), std::chrono::seconds(3));\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, UdpAddress) {\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  EXPECT_FALSE(manager_->isWorkerStarted());\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n  // Validate that there are no active listeners and workers are started.\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_\n                   .gauge(\"listener_manager.total_active_listeners\",\n                          Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                   .value());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1, server_.stats_store_\n                   .gauge(\"listener_manager.workers_started\", Stats::Gauge::ImportMode::NeverImport)\n                   .value());\n\n  const std::string proto_text = R\"EOF(\n    address: {\n      socket_address: {\n        protocol: UDP\n        address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n        port_value: 1234\n      }\n    }\n  )EOF\";\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto;\n  EXPECT_TRUE(Protobuf::TextFormat::ParseFromString(proto_text, &listener_proto));\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_,\n              createListenSocket(_, Network::Socket::Type::Datagram, _,\n                                 ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort, _, 0))\n      .WillOnce(\n          Invoke([this](const Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr&, Network::Socket::Type,\n                        const Network::Socket::OptionsSharedPtr&,\n                        ListenerComponentFactory::BindType, const Network::SocketCreationOptions&,\n                        uint32_t) { return listener_factory_.socket_; }));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, setSocketOption(_, _, _, _)).Times(testing::AtLeast(1));\n  EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, close(_)).WillRepeatedly(Return(Api::SysCallIntResult{0, errno}));\n  addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_EQ(1u, manager_->listeners().size());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, AllowOnlyDefaultFilterChain) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\ndefault_filter_chain:\n  filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1, manager_->listeners().size());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadListenerConfig) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\ntest: a\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                          \"test\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadListenerConfigNoFilterChains) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                          \"no filter chains specified\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadFilterConfig) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  - foo: type\n    name: name\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                          \"foo\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadConnectionLessUdpConfigWithFilterChain) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    protocol: UDP\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                          \"1 filter chain\\\\(s\\\\) specified for connection-less UDP listener\");\n}\n\nclass NonTerminalFilterFactory : public Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory {\npublic:\n  // Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory\n  absl::StatusOr<Network::FilterFactoryCb>\n  createFilterFactoryFromProto(const Protobuf::Message&,\n                               Server::Configuration::FactoryContext&) override {\n    return [](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {};\n  }\n\n  ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr createEmptyConfigProto() override {\n    return std::make_unique<\n        test::extensions::listener_managers::listener_manager::NonTerminalFilter>();\n  }\n\n  std::string name() const override { return \"non_terminal\"; }\n};\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TerminalNotLast) {\n  NonTerminalFilterFactory filter;\n  Registry::InjectFactory<Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory> registered(filter);\n\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  - name: non_terminal\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.listener_managers.listener_manager.NonTerminalFilter\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n      \"Error: non-terminal filter named non_terminal of type non_terminal is the last \"\n      \"filter in a network filter chain.\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, NotTerminalLast) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  - name: envoy.filters.network.tcp_proxy\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.tcp_proxy.v3.TcpProxy\n      stat_prefix: tcp\n      cluster: cluster\n  - name: unknown_but_will_not_be_processed\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n      \"Error: terminal filter named envoy.filters.network.tcp_proxy of type \"\n      \"envoy.filters.network.tcp_proxy must be the last filter in a network filter chain.\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, BadFilterName) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  - name: invalid\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n      \"Didn't find a registered implementation for 'invalid' with type URL: ''\");\n}\n\nclass TestStatsConfigFactory : public Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory {\npublic:\n  // Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory\n  absl::StatusOr<Network::FilterFactoryCb> createFilterFactoryFromProto(\n      const Protobuf::Message&,\n      Configuration::FactoryContext& filter_chain_factory_context) override {\n    return commonFilterFactory(filter_chain_factory_context);\n  }\n\n  ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr createEmptyConfigProto() override {\n    return std::make_unique<\n        test::extensions::listener_managers::listener_manager::TestStatsFilter>();\n  }\n\n  std::string name() const override { return \"stats_test\"; }\n\n  bool isTerminalFilterByProto(const Protobuf::Message&,\n                               Server::Configuration::ServerFactoryContext&) override {\n    return true;\n  }\n\nprivate:\n  Network::FilterFactoryCb commonFilterFactory(Configuration::FactoryContext& context) {\n    context.scope().counterFromString(\"bar\").inc();\n    return [](Network::FilterManager&) -> void {};\n  }\n};\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, StatsScopeTest) {\n  TestStatsConfigFactory filter;\n  Registry::InjectFactory<Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory> registered(filter);\n\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nbind_to_port: false\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  - name: stats_test\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.listener_managers.listener_manager.TestStatsFilter\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_,\n              createListenSocket(_, _, _, ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  manager_->listeners().front().get().listenerScope().counterFromString(\"foo\").inc();\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\"bar\").value());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\"listener.127.0.0.1_1234.foo\").value());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, UsingAddressAsStatsPrefixForMultipleAddresses) {\n  TestStatsConfigFactory filter;\n  Registry::InjectFactory<Configuration::NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory> registered(filter);\n\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.2\n      port_value: 4567\nbind_to_port: false\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  - name: stats_test\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.extensions.listener_managers.listener_manager.TestStatsFilter\n  name: foo\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_,\n              createListenSocket(_, _, _, ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::NoBind, _, 0))\n      .Times(2);\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  manager_->listeners().front().get().listenerScope().counterFromString(\"foo\").inc();\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\"bar\").value());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, server_.stats_store_.counterFromString(\"listener.127.0.0.1_1234.foo\").value());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, MultipleSocketTypeSpecifiedInAddresses) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        protocol: TCP\n        address: \"::0\"\n        port_value: 13332\n    additional_addresses:\n    - address:\n        socket_address:\n          protocol: TCP\n          address: \"::0\"\n          port_value: 13333\n    - address:\n        socket_address:\n          protocol: UDP\n          address: \"::0\"\n          port_value: 13334\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(\n      manager_->addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml), \"\", true).status().message(),\n      \"listener foo: has different socket type. The listener only \"\n      \"support same socket type for all the addresses.\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectNoAddresses) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    connection_balance_config:\n      exact_balance: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(\n      manager_->addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml), \"\", true).status().message(),\n      \"error adding listener named 'foo': address is necessary\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectMutlipleInternalAddresses) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      envoy_internal_address:\n        server_listener_name: a_listener_name_1\n    additional_addresses:\n    - address:\n        envoy_internal_address:\n          server_listener_name: a_listener_name_1\n    - address:\n        envoy_internal_address:\n          server_listener_name: a_listener_name_2\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(\n      manager_->addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml), \"\", true).status().message(),\n      \"error adding listener named 'foo': use internal_listener field \"\n      \"instead of address for internal listeners\");\n\n  const std::string yaml2 = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        protocol: TCP\n        address: \"::0\"\n        port_value: 13332\n    additional_addresses:\n    - address:\n        envoy_internal_address:\n          server_listener_name: a_listener_name_1\n    - address:\n        envoy_internal_address:\n          server_listener_name: a_listener_name_2\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(\n      manager_->addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml2), \"\", true).status().message(),\n      \"error adding listener named 'foo': use internal_listener field \"\n      \"instead of address for internal listeners\");\n\n  const std::string yaml3 = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      envoy_internal_address:\n        server_listener_name: a_listener_name_1\n    additional_addresses:\n    - address:\n        socket_address:\n          protocol: TCP\n          address: \"::0\"\n          port_value: 13332\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(\n      manager_->addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml3), \"\", true).status().message(),\n      \"error adding listener named 'foo': use internal_listener field \"\n      \"instead of address for internal listeners\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectIpv4CompatOnIpv4Address) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        address: \"0.0.0.0\"\n        port_value: 13333\n        ipv4_compat: true\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"Only IPv6 address '::' or valid IPv4-mapped IPv6 address can set \"\n                            \"ipv4_compat: 0.0.0.0:13333\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectIpv4CompatOnNonIpv4MappedIpv6address) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        address: \"::1\"\n        port_value: 13333\n        ipv4_compat: true\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n      \"Only IPv6 address '::' or valid IPv4-mapped IPv6 address can set ipv4_compat: [::1]:13333\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, AcceptIpv4CompatOnIpv6AnyAddress) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        address: \"::\"\n        port_value: 13333\n        ipv4_compat: true\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)));\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, AcceptIpv4CompatOnNonCanonicalIpv6AnyAddress) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        address: \"::0\"\n        port_value: 13333\n        ipv4_compat: true\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)));\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectListenerWithSocketAddressWithInternalListenerConfig) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        address: 127.0.0.1\n        port_value: 1234\n    internal_listener: {}\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener 'foo': address should not be used \"\n                            \"when an internal listener config is provided\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectListenerWithInternalListenerAddress) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      envoy_internal_address:\n        server_listener_name: test\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener named 'foo': use internal_listener field \"\n                            \"instead of address for internal listeners\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectListenerWithInternalAndApiListener) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    internal_listener: {}\n    api_listener:\n      api_listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n        stat_prefix: hcm\n        route_config:\n          name: api_router\n          virtual_hosts:\n            - name: api\n              domains:\n                - \"*\"\n              routes:\n                - match:\n                    prefix: \"/\"\n                  route:\n                    cluster: dynamic_forward_proxy_cluster\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n      \"error adding listener named 'foo': api_listener and internal_listener cannot be both set\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, RejectTcpOptionsWithInternalListenerConfig) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    internal_listener: {}\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  auto listener = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n  auto listener_mutators = std::vector<std::function<void(envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener&)>>{\n      [](envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& l) {\n        l.mutable_connection_balance_config()->mutable_exact_balance();\n      },\n      [](envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& l) { l.mutable_enable_reuse_port(); },\n      [](envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& l) { l.mutable_freebind()->set_value(true); },\n      [](envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& l) { l.mutable_tcp_backlog_size(); },\n      [](envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& l) { l.mutable_tcp_fast_open_queue_length(); },\n      [](envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener& l) { l.mutable_transparent()->set_value(true); },\n\n  };\n  for (const auto& f : listener_mutators) {\n    auto new_listener = listener;\n    f(new_listener);\n    EXPECT_EQ(ListenerImpl::create(new_listener, \"version\", *manager_, \"foo\", true, false,\n                                   /*hash=*/static_cast<uint64_t>(0))\n                  .status()\n                  .message(),\n              \"error adding listener named 'foo': has \"\n              \"unsupported tcp listener feature\");\n  }\n  {\n    auto new_listener = listener;\n    new_listener.mutable_socket_options()->Add();\n    EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(new_listener), EnvoyException,\n                              \"error adding listener named 'foo': does \"\n                              \"not support socket option\")\n  }\n  {\n    auto new_listener = listener;\n    new_listener.set_enable_mptcp(true);\n    EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(new_listener), EnvoyException,\n                              \"listener foo: enable_mptcp can only be used with IP addresses\")\n  }\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, NotDefaultListenerFiltersTimeout) {\n  const std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 10000 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters:\n    listener_filters_timeout: 0s\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)));\n  EXPECT_EQ(std::chrono::milliseconds(),\n            manager_->listeners().front().get().listenerFiltersTimeout());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, ModifyOnlyDrainType) {\n  InSequence s;\n\n  // Add foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 10000 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters:\n    drain_type: MODIFY_ONLY\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo =\n      expectListenerCreate(false, true, envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener::MODIFY_ONLY);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml)));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, AddListenerAddressNotMatching) {\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(1001001001001));\n\n  InSequence s;\n\n  auto* lds_api = new MockLdsApi();\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createLdsApi_(_, _)).WillOnce(Return(lds_api));\n  envoy::config::core::v3::ConfigSource lds_config;\n  manager_->createLdsApi(lds_config, nullptr);\n\n  // Add foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"version1\"));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version1\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nversion_info: version1\nstatic_listeners:\ndynamic_listeners:\n  - name: foo\n    warming_state:\n      version_info: version1\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: foo\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1234\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 1001001001\n        nanos: 1000000\n)EOF\");\n\n  // Update foo listener, but with a different address.\n  const std::string listener_foo_different_address_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1235\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(2002002002002));\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_different_address = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  // Another socket should be created.\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_different_address_yaml),\n                                  \"version2\"));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version2\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nversion_info: version2\nstatic_listeners:\ndynamic_listeners:\n  - name: foo\n    warming_state:\n      version_info: version2\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: foo\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1235\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 2002002002\n        nanos: 2000000\n)EOF\");\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n  worker_->callAddCompletion();\n\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(3003003003003));\n\n  // Add baz listener, this time requiring initializing.\n  const std::string listener_baz_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: baz\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n    port_value: 1236\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_baz = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_baz->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_baz_yaml), \"version3\"));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version3\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nversion_info: version3\nstatic_listeners:\ndynamic_listeners:\n  - name: foo\n    active_state:\n      version_info: version2\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: foo\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1235\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 2002002002\n        nanos: 2000000\n  - name: baz\n    warming_state:\n      version_info: version3\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: baz\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1236\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 3003003003\n        nanos: 3000000\n)EOF\");\n\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(4004004004004));\n\n  const std::string listener_baz_different_address_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: baz\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n    port_value: 1237\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  // Modify the address of a warming listener.\n  ListenerHandle* listener_baz_different_address = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n  // Another socket should be created.\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_baz, onDestroy()).WillOnce(Invoke([listener_baz]() -> void {\n    listener_baz->target_.ready();\n  }));\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_baz_different_address->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_baz_different_address_yaml),\n                                  \"version4\"));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version4\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nversion_info: version4\nstatic_listeners:\ndynamic_listeners:\n  - name: foo\n    active_state:\n      version_info: version2\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: foo\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1235\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 2002002002\n        nanos: 2000000\n  - name: baz\n    warming_state:\n      version_info: version4\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: baz\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1237\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 4004004004\n        nanos: 4000000\n)EOF\");\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  listener_baz_different_address->target_.ready();\n  worker_->callAddCompletion();\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_different_address, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_baz_different_address, onDestroy());\n}\n\n// Make sure that a listener creation does not fail on IPv4 only setups when FilterChainMatch is not\n// specified and we try to create default CidrRange. See makeCidrListEntry function for\n// more details.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, AddListenerOnIpv4OnlySetups) {\n  InSequence s;\n\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\ndrain_type: default\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n\n  ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, socket(AF_INET, _, 0))\n      .WillByDefault(Return(Api::SysCallSocketResult{5, 0}));\n  ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, socket(AF_INET6, _, 0))\n      .WillByDefault(Return(Api::SysCallSocketResult{INVALID_SOCKET, 0}));\n  ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, close(_)).WillByDefault(Return(Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0}));\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml)));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n}\n\n// Make sure that a listener creation does not fail on IPv6 only setups when FilterChainMatch is not\n// specified and we try to create default CidrRange. See makeCidrListEntry function for\n// more details.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, AddListenerOnIpv6OnlySetups) {\n  InSequence s;\n\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"::0001\"\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\ndrain_type: default\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n\n  ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, socket(AF_INET, _, 0))\n      .WillByDefault(Return(Api::SysCallSocketResult{INVALID_SOCKET, 0}));\n  ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, socket(AF_INET6, _, 0))\n      .WillByDefault(Return(Api::SysCallSocketResult{5, 0}));\n  ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, close(_)).WillByDefault(Return(Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0}));\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml)));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n}\n\n// Make sure that a listener that is not added_via_api cannot be updated or removed.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, UpdateRemoveNotModifiableListener) {\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(1001001001001));\n\n  InSequence s;\n\n  // Add foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, false);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"\", false));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nstatic_listeners:\n  listener:\n    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address:\n      socket_address:\n        address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n        port_value: 1234\n    filter_chains: {}\n  last_updated:\n    seconds: 1001001001\n    nanos: 1000000\n)EOF\");\n\n  // Update foo listener. Should be blocked.\n  const std::string listener_foo_update1_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  - name: fake\n  )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_FALSE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_update1_yaml), \"\", false));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  // Remove foo listener. Should be blocked.\n  EXPECT_FALSE(manager_->removeListener(\"foo\"));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n}\n\n// Tests that when listener tears down, server's initManager is notified.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, ListenerTeardownNotifiesServerInitManager) {\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(1001001001001));\n\n  InSequence s;\n\n  auto* lds_api = new MockLdsApi();\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createLdsApi_(_, _)).WillOnce(Return(lds_api));\n  envoy::config::core::v3::ConfigSource lds_config;\n  manager_->createLdsApi(lds_config, nullptr);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nstatic_listeners:\n)EOF\");\n\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: \"foo\"\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  const std::string listener_foo_address_update_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: \"foo\"\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n    port_value: 1235\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  Init::ManagerImpl server_init_mgr(\"server-init-manager\");\n  Init::ExpectableWatcherImpl server_init_watcher(\"server-init-watcher\");\n  { // Add and remove a listener before starting workers.\n    ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    EXPECT_CALL(server_, initManager()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(server_init_mgr));\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"version1\"));\n    checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n    EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version1\"));\n    checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nversion_info: version1\nstatic_listeners:\ndynamic_listeners:\n  - name: foo\n    warming_state:\n      version_info: version1\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: foo\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1234\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 1001001001\n        nanos: 1000000\n)EOF\");\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo->target_, initialize());\n    server_init_mgr.initialize(server_init_watcher);\n    // Since listener_foo->target_ is not ready, the listener's listener_init_target will not be\n    // ready until the destruction happens.\n    server_init_watcher.expectReady();\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(manager_->removeListener(\"foo\"));\n  }\n  // Listener foo's listener_init_target_ is the only target added to server_init_mgr.\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_init_mgr.state(), Init::Manager::State::Initialized);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nstatic_listeners:\n)EOF\");\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  // Now add new version listener foo after workers start, note it's fine that server_init_mgr is\n  // initialized, as no target will be added to it.\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(2002002002002));\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_, initManager()).Times(0); // No target added to server init manager.\n  server_init_watcher.expectReady().Times(0);\n  {\n    ListenerHandle* listener_foo2 = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n    // Version 2 listener will be initialized by listener manager directly.\n    EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo2->target_, initialize());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"version2\"));\n    // Version2 is in warming list as listener_foo2->target_ is not ready yet.\n    checkStats(__LINE__, /*added=*/2, 0, /*removed=*/1, /*warming=*/1, 0, 0, 0);\n    EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version2\"));\n    checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\n  version_info: version2\n  static_listeners:\n  dynamic_listeners:\n    - name: foo\n      warming_state:\n        version_info: version2\n        listener:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n          name: foo\n          address:\n            socket_address:\n              address: 127.0.0.1\n              port_value: 1234\n          filter_chains: {}\n        last_updated:\n          seconds: 2002002002\n          nanos: 2000000\n  )EOF\");\n\n    // Delete foo-listener again.\n    EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo2, onDestroy());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(manager_->removeListener(\"foo\"));\n  }\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, OverrideListener) {\n  InSequence s;\n\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(1001001001001));\n  auto* lds_api = new MockLdsApi();\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createLdsApi_(_, _)).WillOnce(Return(lds_api));\n  envoy::config::core::v3::ConfigSource lds_config;\n  manager_->createLdsApi(lds_config, nullptr);\n\n  // Add foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: \"foo\"\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"version1\", true));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  // Start workers and capture ListenerImpl.\n  Network::ListenerConfig* listener_config = nullptr;\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _))\n      .WillOnce(Invoke(\n          [&listener_config](auto, Network::ListenerConfig& config, auto, Runtime::Loader&,\n                             Random::RandomGenerator&) -> void { listener_config = &config; }))\n      .RetiresOnSaturation();\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_create_success\").value());\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  // Update foo into warming.\n  const std::string listener_foo_update1_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  filter_chain_match:\n    destination_port: 1234\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_update1 = expectListenerOverridden(false);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, duplicate());\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  auto* timer = new Event::MockTimer(dynamic_cast<Event::MockDispatcher*>(&server_.dispatcher()));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*timer, enableTimer(_, _));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_update1_yaml)));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  worker_->callAddCompletion();\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeFilterChains(_, _, _));\n  timer->invokeCallback();\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n  worker_->callDrainFilterChainsComplete();\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_update1, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_create_success\").value());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, AddOrUpdateListener) {\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(1001001001001));\n  NiceMock<Matchers::MockStringMatcher> mock_matcher;\n  ON_CALL(mock_matcher, match(_)).WillByDefault(Return(false));\n  InSequence s;\n\n  auto* lds_api = new MockLdsApi();\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createLdsApi_(_, _)).WillOnce(Return(lds_api));\n  envoy::config::core::v3::ConfigSource lds_config;\n  manager_->createLdsApi(lds_config, nullptr);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nstatic_listeners:\n)EOF\");\n\n  // Add foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: \"foo\"\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"version1\", true));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version1\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nversion_info: version1\nstatic_listeners:\ndynamic_listeners:\n  - name: foo\n    warming_state:\n      version_info: version1\n      listener:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener\n        name: foo\n        address:\n          socket_address:\n            address: 127.0.0.1\n            port_value: 1234\n        filter_chains: {}\n      last_updated:\n        seconds: 1001001001\n        nanos: 1000000\n)EOF\");\n  EXPECT_CALL(*lds_api, versionInfo()).WillOnce(Return(\"version1\"));\n  checkConfigDump(R\"EOF(\nversion_info: version1\nstatic_listeners:\ndynamic_listeners:\n)EOF\",\n                  mock_matcher);\n\n  // Update duplicate should be a NOP.\n  EXPECT_FALSE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml)));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  // Update foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_update1_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: \"foo\"\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: \"127.0.0.1\"\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains: {}\nper_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 10\n  )EOF\";\n\n  time_system_.setSystemTime(std::chrono::milliseconds(2002002002002));\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_update1 = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  auto duplicated_socket = new NiceMock<Network::MockListenSocket>();\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, duplicate())\n      .WillOnce(Return(ByMove(std::unique_ptr<Network::Socket>(duplicated_socket))));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_update1_yaml), \"version2\", true));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0,
