no match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n      \"filter_state_key\", std::make_shared<Router::StringAccessorImpl>(\"filter_state_value\"),\n      StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable, StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection);\n\n  // Known filter state key and matching value - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain->name(), \"foo\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SingleFilterChainWithApplicationProtocolMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        application_protocols: \"http/1.1\"\n        source_type: ANY\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    // TODO(kyessenov) Switch to using prefix/suffix/containment matching for ALPN.\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: application\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.ApplicationProtocolInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"'h2','http/1.1'\":\n              action:\n                name: foo\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // TLS client without ALPN - no match.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  // TLS client with \"http/1.1\" ALPN - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"8.8.8.8\",\n      111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n}\n\n// Define a source_type filter chain match and test against it.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SingleFilterChainWithSourceTypeMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        source_type: SAME_IP_OR_LOOPBACK\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: source-type\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourceTypeInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            local:\n              action:\n                name: foo\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // EXTERNAL IPv4 client without \"http/1.1\" ALPN - no match.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  // LOCAL IPv4 client with \"http/1.1\" ALPN - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"127.0.0.1\",\n      111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // LOCAL UDS client with \"http/1.1\" ALPN - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      0, \"/tmp/test.sock\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11},\n      \"/tmp/test.sock\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n}\n\n// Verify source IP matches.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SingleFilterChainWithSourceIpMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        source_prefix_ranges:\n          - address_prefix: 10.0.0.1\n            prefix_len: 24\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: ip\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourceIPInput\n        custom_match:\n          name: ip-matcher\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/xds.type.matcher.v3.IPMatcher\n            range_matchers:\n            - ranges:\n              - address_prefix: 10.0.0.1\n                prefix_len: 24\n              on_match:\n                action:\n                  name: foo\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // IPv4 client with source 10.0.1.1. No match.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"10.0.1.1\", 111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  // IPv4 client with source 10.0.0.10, Match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"10.0.0.10\",\n      111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // IPv6 client. No match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {},\n                                 \"2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:8a2e:0370:7334\", 111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  // UDS client. No match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      0, \"/tmp/test.sock\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11},\n      \"/tmp/test.sock\", 0);\n  ASSERT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n}\n\n// Verify source IPv6 matches.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SingleFilterChainWithSourceIpv6Match) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        source_prefix_ranges:\n          - address_prefix: 2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000\n            prefix_len: 64\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: ip\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourceIPInput\n        custom_match:\n          name: ip-matcher\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/xds.type.matcher.v3.IPMatcher\n            range_matchers:\n            - ranges:\n              - address_prefix: 2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000\n                prefix_len: 64\n              on_match:\n                action:\n                  name: foo\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // IPv6 client with matching subnet. Match.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {},\n                                      \"2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:8a2e:0370:7334\", 111);\n  EXPECT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  // IPv6 client with non-matching subnet. No match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {},\n                                 \"2001:0db8:85a3:0001:0000:8a2e:0370:7334\", 111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n}\n\n// Verify source port matches.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SingleFilterChainWithSourcePortMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        source_ports:\n          - 100\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: port\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourcePortInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"100\":\n              action:\n                name: foo\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // Client with source port 100. Match.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 100);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // Client with source port 101. No match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"8.8.8.8\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"4.4.4.4\",\n      101);\n  ASSERT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n}\n\n// Define multiple source_type filter chain matches and test against them.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithSourceTypeMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        source_type: SAME_IP_OR_LOOPBACK\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        application_protocols: \"http/1.1\"\n        source_type: EXTERNAL\n      name: bar\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        source_type: ANY\n      name: baz\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    // TODO(kyessenov) Switch to using prefix/suffix/containment matching for ALPN.\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: source-type\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.SourceTypeInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            local:\n              matcher:\n                matcher_tree:\n                  input:\n                    name: application\n                    typed_config:\n                      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.ApplicationProtocolInput\n                  exact_match_map:\n                    map:\n                      \"'h2','http/1.1'\":\n                        action:\n                          name: none\n                          typed_config:\n                            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                            value: none\n                on_no_match:\n                  action:\n                    name: foo\n                    typed_config:\n                      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                      value: foo\n      on_no_match:\n        matcher:\n          matcher_tree:\n            input:\n              name: application\n              typed_config:\n                \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.ApplicationProtocolInput\n            exact_match_map:\n              map:\n                \"'h2','http/1.1'\":\n                  action:\n                    name: bar\n                    typed_config:\n                      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                      value: bar\n          on_no_match:\n            action:\n              name: baz\n              typed_config:\n                \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                value: baz\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // LOCAL TLS client with \"http/1.1\" ALPN - no match.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"127.0.0.1\",\n      111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  // LOCAL TLS client without \"http/1.1\" ALPN - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // EXTERNAL TLS client with \"http/1.1\" ALPN - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"8.8.8.8\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"4.4.4.4\",\n      111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n\n  // EXTERNAL TLS client without \"http/1.1\" ALPN - using 3rd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"8.8.8.8\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"4.4.4.4\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 2);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"*.example.com\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithDestinationPortMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        # empty\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        destination_port: 8080\n      name: bar\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        destination_port: 8081\n      name: baz\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: port\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationPortInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"8080\":\n              action:\n                name: bar\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: bar\n            \"8081\":\n              action:\n                name: baz\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: baz\n      on_no_match:\n        action:\n          name: foo\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n            value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to default port - using 1st filter chain.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to port 8080 - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(8080, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to port 8081 - using 3rd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(8081, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 2);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"*.example.com\");\n\n  // UDS client - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(0, \"/tmp/test.sock\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithDestinationIPMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        # empty\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        prefix_ranges: { address_prefix: 192.168.0.1, prefix_len: 32 }\n      name: bar\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        prefix_ranges: { address_prefix: 192.168.0.0, prefix_len: 16 }\n      name: baz\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: ip\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationIPInput\n        custom_match:\n          name: ip-matcher\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/xds.type.matcher.v3.IPMatcher\n            range_matchers:\n            - ranges:\n              - address_prefix: 192.168.0.1\n                prefix_len: 32\n              on_match:\n                action:\n                  name: bar\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: bar\n            - ranges:\n              - address_prefix: 192.168.0.0\n                prefix_len: 16\n              on_match:\n                action:\n                  name: baz\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: baz\n      on_no_match:\n        action:\n          name: foo\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n            value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // UDS client connects - using 1st filter chain with no IP match\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to default IP - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to exact IP match - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"192.168.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to wildcard IP match - using 3rd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"192.168.1.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"192.168.1.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 2);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"*.example.com\");\n\n  // UDS client - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(0, \"/tmp/test.sock\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"/tmp/test.sock\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithDirectSourceIPMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        # empty\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        direct_source_prefix_ranges: { address_prefix: 192.168.0.1, prefix_len: 32 }\n      name: bar\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        direct_source_prefix_ranges: { address_prefix: 192.168.0.0, prefix_len: 16 }\n      name: baz\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: ip\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DirectSourceIPInput\n        custom_match:\n          name: ip-matcher\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/xds.type.matcher.v3.IPMatcher\n            range_matchers:\n            - ranges:\n              - address_prefix: 192.168.0.1\n                prefix_len: 32\n              on_match:\n                action:\n                  name: bar\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: bar\n            - ranges:\n              - address_prefix: 192.168.0.0\n                prefix_len: 16\n              on_match:\n                action:\n                  name: baz\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: baz\n      on_no_match:\n        action:\n          name: foo\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n            value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // UDS client connects - using 1st filter chain with no IP match\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"/uds_1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"/uds_2\", 111, \"/uds_3\");\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to default IP - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111, \"127.0.0.1\");\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to exact IP match - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111, \"192.168.0.1\");\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // IPv4 client connects to wildcard IP match - using 3rd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111, \"192.168.1.1\");\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 2);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"*.example.com\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithServerNamesMatch) {\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    GTEST_SKIP() << \"Server name matching not implemented for unified matcher\";\n  }\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        # empty\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\" }\n          session_ticket_keys:\n            keys:\n            - filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ticket_key_a\"\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"server1.example.com\"\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n          session_ticket_keys:\n            keys:\n            - filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ticket_key_a\"\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"*.com\"\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_multiple_dns_key.pem\" }\n          session_ticket_keys:\n            keys:\n            - filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ticket_key_a\"\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // TLS client without SNI - using 1st filter chain.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto uri = ssl_socket->ssl()->uriSanLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(uri[0], \"spiffe://lyft.com/test-team\");\n\n  // TLS client with exact SNI match - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain =\n      findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"server1.example.com\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n\n  // TLS client with wildcard SNI match - using 3rd filter chain.\n  filter_chain =\n      findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"server2.example.com\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 2);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"*.example.com\");\n\n  // TLS client with wildcard SNI match - using 3rd filter chain.\n  filter_chain =\n      findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"www.wildcard.com\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  ssl_socket = dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 2);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"*.example.com\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithTransportProtocolMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        # empty\n      name: foo\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        transport_protocol: \"tls\"\n      name: bar\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: transport\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.TransportProtocolInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"tls\":\n              action:\n                name: bar\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: bar\n      on_no_match:\n        action:\n          name: foo\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n            value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // TCP client - using 1st filter chain.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"raw_buffer\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_FALSE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n\n  // TLS client - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithFilterStateMatch) {\n  if (!use_matcher_) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::string yaml = R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n    - name: bar\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: filter_state\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.FilterStateInput\n            key: filter_state_key\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"filter_state_value\":\n              action:\n                name: bar\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: bar\n      on_no_match:\n        action:\n          name: foo\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n            value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // No filter state value set - match foo.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain->name(), \"foo\");\n\n  stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n      \"unknown_key\", std::make_shared<Router::StringAccessorImpl>(\"unknown_value\"),\n      StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable, StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection);\n\n  // Filter state set to a non-matching key - no match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain->name(), \"foo\");\n\n  stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n      \"filter_state_key\", std::make_shared<Router::StringAccessorImpl>(\"unknown_value\"),\n      StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable, StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection);\n\n  // Filter state set to a matching key but unknown value - no match.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain->name(), \"foo\");\n\n  stream_info_.filterState()->setData(\n      \"filter_state_key\", std::make_shared<Router::StringAccessorImpl>(\"filter_state_value\"),\n      StreamInfo::FilterState::StateType::Mutable, StreamInfo::FilterState::LifeSpan::Connection);\n\n  // Known filter state key and matching value - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain->name(), \"bar\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithApplicationProtocolMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      filter_chain_match:\n        # empty\n    - name: bar\n      filter_chain_match:\n        application_protocols: [\"dummy\", \"h2\"]\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: transport\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.ApplicationProtocolInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"'h2','http/1.1'\":\n              action:\n                name: bar\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: bar\n      on_no_match:\n        action:\n          name: foo\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n            value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // TLS client without ALPN - using 1st filter chain.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_FALSE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n\n  // TLS client with \"h2,http/1.1\" ALPN - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"127.0.0.1\",\n      111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithMultipleRequirementsMatch) {\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    GTEST_SKIP() << \"ALPN list and server name matching not implemented for unified matcher\";\n  }\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        # empty\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: [\"www.example.com\", \"server1.example.com\"]\n        transport_protocol: \"tls\"\n        application_protocols: [\"dummy\", \"h2\"]\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // TLS client without SNI and ALPN - using 1st filter chain.\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_FALSE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n\n  // TLS client with exact SNI match but without ALPN - no match (SNI blackholed by\n  // configuration).\n  filter_chain =\n      findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"server1.example.com\", \"tls\", {}, \"127.0.0.1\", 111);\n  EXPECT_EQ(filter_chain, nullptr);\n\n  // TLS client with ALPN match but without SNI - using 1st filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"127.0.0.1\",\n      111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_FALSE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n\n  // TLS client with exact SNI match and ALPN match - using 2nd filter chain.\n  filter_chain = findFilterChain(\n      1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"server1.example.com\", \"tls\",\n      {Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http2, Http::Utility::AlpnNames::get().Http11}, \"127.0.0.1\",\n      111);\n  ASSERT_NE(filter_chain, nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto transport_socket = filter_chain->transportSocketFactory().createDownstreamTransportSocket();\n  auto ssl_socket =\n      dynamic_cast<Extensions::TransportSockets::Tls::SslSocket*>(transport_socket.get());\n  auto server_names = ssl_socket->ssl()->dnsSansLocalCertificate();\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.size(), 1);\n  EXPECT_EQ(server_names.front(), \"server1.example.com\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithDifferentSessionTicketKeys) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"example.com\"\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n          session_ticket_keys:\n            keys:\n            - filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ticket_key_a\"\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"www.example.com\"\n      name: bar\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n          session_ticket_keys:\n            keys:\n            - filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ticket_key_b\"\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest,\n       MultipleFilterChainsWithMixedUseOfSessionTicketKeys) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"example.com\"\n      name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n          session_ticket_keys:\n            keys:\n            - filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ticket_key_a\"\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"www.example.com\"\n      name: bar\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_cert.pem\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SingleFilterChainWithInvalidDestinationIPMatch) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        prefix_ranges: { address_prefix: a.b.c.d, prefix_len: 32 }\n      name: foo\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: ip\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationIPInput\n        custom_match:\n          name: ip-matcher\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/xds.type.matcher.v3.IPMatcher\n            range_matchers:\n            - ranges:\n              - address_prefix: a.b.c.d\n                prefix_len: 32\n              on_match:\n                action:\n                  name: foo\n                  typed_config:\n                    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                    value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"malformed IP address: a.b.c.d\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, SingleFilterChainWithInvalidServerNamesMatch) {\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    GTEST_SKIP() << \"Server name matching not implemented for unified matcher\";\n  }\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"*w.example.com\"\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': partial wildcards are not \"\n                            \"supported in \\\"server_names\\\"\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithSameMatch) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - name : foo\n      filter_chain_match:\n        transport_protocol: \"tls\"\n    - name: bar\n      filter_chain_match:\n        transport_protocol: \"tls\"\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    EXPECT_NO_THROW(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)));\n    return;\n  }\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': filter chain 'bar' has \"\n                            \"the same matching rules defined as 'foo'\"\n#ifdef ENVOY_ENABLE_YAML\n                            \". duplicate matcher is: {\\\"transport_protocol\\\":\\\"tls\\\"}\"\n#endif\n  );\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest,\n       MultipleFilterChainsWithSameMatchPlusUnimplementedFields) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      filter_chain_match:\n        transport_protocol: \"tls\"\n    - name: bar\n      filter_chain_match:\n        transport_protocol: \"tls\"\n        address_suffix: 127.0.0.0\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(\n      addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n      \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': filter chain 'bar' contains unimplemented fields\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MultipleFilterChainsWithOverlappingRules) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: \"envoy.filters.listener.test\"\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestInspectorFilterConfig\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: \"example.com\"\n    - name: bar\n      filter_chain_match:\n        server_names: [\"example.com\", \"www.example.com\"]\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    EXPECT_NO_THROW(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)));\n    return;\n  }\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': multiple filter chains with \"\n                            \"overlapping matching rules are defined\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MatcherFilterChainWithoutName) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: tls_inspector\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.listener.tls_inspector.v3.TlsInspector\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: port\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationPortInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"10000\":\n              action:\n                name: foo\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: foo\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters: []\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': \\\"name\\\" field is required \"\n                            \"when using a listener matcher\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, MatcherFilterChainWithDuplicateName) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    listener_filters:\n    - name: tls_inspector\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.listener.tls_inspector.v3.TlsInspector\n    filter_chain_matcher:\n      matcher_tree:\n        input:\n          name: port\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationPortInput\n        exact_match_map:\n          map:\n            \"10000\":\n              action:\n                name: foo\n                typed_config:\n                  \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                  value: foo\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      filters: []\n    - name: foo\n      filters: []\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': \\\"name\\\" field is duplicated \"\n                            \"with value 'foo'\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsCertificateInline) {\n  const std::string cert = TestEnvironment::readFileToStringForTest(TestEnvironment::substitute(\n      \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_chain.pem\"));\n  const std::string pkey = TestEnvironment::readFileToStringForTest(\n      TestEnvironment::substitute(\"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_key.pem\"));\n  const std::string ca = TestEnvironment::readFileToStringForTest(\n      TestEnvironment::substitute(\"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"));\n  const std::string yaml = absl::StrCat(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { inline_string: \")EOF\",\n                                        absl::CEscape(cert), R\"EOF(\" }\n                private_key: { inline_string: \")EOF\",\n                                        absl::CEscape(pkey), R\"EOF(\" }\n            validation_context:\n              trusted_ca: { inline_string: \")EOF\",\n                                        absl::CEscape(ca), R\"EOF(\" }\n  )EOF\");\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsCertificateChainInlinePrivateKeyFilename) {\n  const std::string cert = TestEnvironment::readFileToStringForTest(TestEnvironment::substitute(\n      \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_chain.pem\"));\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(absl::StrCat(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_key.pem\" }\n                certificate_chain: { inline_string: \")EOF\",\n                                                                    absl::CEscape(cert), R\"EOF(\" }\n  )EOF\"),\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsCertificateIncomplete) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_chain.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"Failed to load incomplete private key from path: \");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsCertificateInvalidCertificateChain) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { inline_string: \"invalid\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"Failed to load certificate chain from <inline>\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsCertificateInvalidIntermediateCA) {\n  const std::string leaf = TestEnvironment::readFileToStringForTest(\n      TestEnvironment::substitute(\"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_cert.pem\"));\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(\n      absl::StrCat(\n          R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { inline_string: \")EOF\",\n          absl::CEscape(leaf),\n          R\"EOF(\\n-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\\nDEFINITELY_INVALID_CERTIFICATE\\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----\" }\n                private_key: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_key.pem\" }\n  )EOF\"),\n      Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml)), EnvoyException,\n                            \"Failed to load certificate chain from <inline>\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, TlsCertificateInvalidPrivateKey) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1234 }\n    filter_chains:\n    - name: foo\n      transport_socket:\n        name: tls\n        typed_config:\n          \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n          common_tls_context:\n            tls_certificates:\n              - certificate_chain: { filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_dns3_chain.pem\" }\n                private_key: { inline_string: \"invalid\" }\n  )EOF\",\n
