EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_update1_yaml)));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  const auto* listener_foo_update1_info = &manager_->listeners()[0].get().listenerInfo();\n\n  // The listener info should be the same because the listener info is shared between the\n  // new listener and the old listener when doing in place update.\n  EXPECT_EQ(listener_foo_info, listener_foo_update1_info);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_update1, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, ListenSocketFactoryIsClonedFromListenerDrainingFilterChain) {\n  InSequence s;\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  // Add foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\ntraffic_direction: INBOUND\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml)));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  listener_foo->target_.ready();\n  worker_->callAddCompletion();\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // Update foo into warming.\n  const std::string listener_foo_update1_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\ntraffic_direction: INBOUND\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  filter_chain_match:\n    destination_port: 1234\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_update1 = expectListenerOverridden(true, listener_foo);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, duplicate());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo_update1->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_update1_yaml)));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  // The warmed up starts the drain timer.\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.options_, drainTime()).WillOnce(Return(std::chrono::seconds(600)));\n  Event::MockTimer* filter_chain_drain_timer = new Event::MockTimer(&server_.dispatcher_);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*filter_chain_drain_timer, enableTimer(std::chrono::milliseconds(600000), _));\n  listener_foo_update1->target_.ready();\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeFilterChains(_, _, _));\n  filter_chain_drain_timer->invokeCallback();\n\n  // Stop the active listener listener_foo_update1.\n  std::function<void()> stop_completion;\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, stopListener(_, _, _))\n      .WillOnce(Invoke([&stop_completion](Network::ListenerConfig&,\n                                          const Network::ExtraShutdownListenerOptions&,\n                                          std::function<void()> completion) -> void {\n        ASSERT_TRUE(completion != nullptr);\n        stop_completion = std::move(completion);\n      }));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_update1->drain_manager_, startDrainSequence(_));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(manager_->removeListener(\"foo\"));\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeListener(_, _));\n  listener_foo_update1->drain_manager_->drain_sequence_completion_();\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_update1, onDestroy());\n  worker_->callRemovalCompletion();\n\n  // The snapshot of the listener manager is\n  // 1) listener_foo is draining filter chain. The listen socket is open.\n  // 2) No listen is active. Note that listener_foo_update1 is stopped.\n  //\n  // The next step is to add a listener on the same socket address and the listen socket of\n  // listener_foo will be duplicated.\n  auto listener_foo_expect_reuse_socket = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, _, _, _)).Times(0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, duplicate());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo_expect_reuse_socket->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"version1\", true));\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_expect_reuse_socket, onDestroy());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest,\n       ListenSocketFactoryIsClonedFromListenerDrainingFilterChainWithMultipleAddresses) {\n  InSequence s;\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  // Add foo listener.\n  const std::string listener_foo_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\ntraffic_direction: INBOUND\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    port_value: 1234\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.2\n      port_value: 4567\nfilter_chains:\n- filters: []\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0)).Times(2);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml)));\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  listener_foo->target_.ready();\n  worker_->callAddCompletion();\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // Update foo into warming.\n  const std::string listener_foo_update1_yaml = R\"EOF(\nname: foo\ntraffic_direction: INBOUND\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.1\n      port_value: 1234\nadditional_addresses:\n- address:\n    socket_address:\n      address: 127.0.0.2\n      port_value: 4567\nfilter_chains:\n- filters:\n  filter_chain_match:\n    destination_port: 1234\n  )EOF\";\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_update1 = expectListenerOverridden(true, listener_foo);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, duplicate()).Times(2);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo_update1->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_update1_yaml)));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(1, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 1, 1, 0, 0);\n\n  // The warmed up starts the drain timer.\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, addListener(_, _, _, _, _));\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.options_, drainTime()).WillOnce(Return(std::chrono::seconds(600)));\n  Event::MockTimer* filter_chain_drain_timer = new Event::MockTimer(&server_.dispatcher_);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*filter_chain_drain_timer, enableTimer(std::chrono::milliseconds(600000), _));\n  listener_foo_update1->target_.ready();\n  checkStats(__LINE__, 1, 1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeFilterChains(_, _, _));\n  filter_chain_drain_timer->invokeCallback();\n\n  // Stop the active listener listener_foo_update1.\n  std::function<void()> stop_completion;\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, stopListener(_, _, _))\n      .WillOnce(Invoke([&stop_completion](Network::ListenerConfig&,\n                                          const Network::ExtraShutdownListenerOptions&,\n                                          std::function<void()> completion) -> void {\n        ASSERT_TRUE(completion != nullptr);\n        stop_completion = std::move(completion);\n      }));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_update1->drain_manager_, startDrainSequence(_));\n  EXPECT_TRUE(manager_->removeListener(\"foo\"));\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, removeListener(_, _));\n  listener_foo_update1->drain_manager_->drain_sequence_completion_();\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_update1, onDestroy());\n  worker_->callRemovalCompletion();\n\n  // The snapshot of the listener manager is\n  // 1) listener_foo is draining filter chain. The listen socket is open.\n  // 2) No listen is active. Note that listener_foo_update1 is stopped.\n  //\n  // The next step is to add a listener on the same socket address and the listen socket of\n  // listener_foo will be duplicated.\n  auto listener_foo_expect_reuse_socket = expectListenerCreate(true, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, _, _, _)).Times(0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, duplicate()).Times(2);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_foo_expect_reuse_socket->target_, initialize());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(listener_foo_yaml), \"version1\", true));\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_expect_reuse_socket, onDestroy());\n}\n\nTEST(ListenerMessageUtilTest, ListenerMessageSameAreEquivalent) {\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener1;\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener2;\n  EXPECT_TRUE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n}\n\nTEST(ListenerMessageUtilTest, ListenerMessageHaveDifferentNameNotEquivalent) {\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener1;\n  listener1.set_name(\"listener1\");\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener2;\n  listener2.set_name(\"listener2\");\n  EXPECT_FALSE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n}\n\nTEST(ListenerMessageUtilTest, ListenerDefaultFilterChainChangeIsAlwaysFilterChainOnlyChange) {\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener1;\n  listener1.set_name(\"common\");\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::FilterChain default_filter_chain_1;\n  default_filter_chain_1.set_name(\"127.0.0.1\");\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener2;\n  listener2.set_name(\"common\");\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::FilterChain default_filter_chain_2;\n  default_filter_chain_2.set_name(\"127.0.0.2\");\n\n  {\n    listener1.clear_default_filter_chain();\n    listener2.clear_default_filter_chain();\n    EXPECT_TRUE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n  }\n  {\n    *listener1.mutable_default_filter_chain() = default_filter_chain_1;\n    listener2.clear_default_filter_chain();\n    EXPECT_TRUE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n  }\n  {\n    listener1.clear_default_filter_chain();\n    *listener2.mutable_default_filter_chain() = default_filter_chain_2;\n    EXPECT_TRUE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n  }\n  {\n    *listener1.mutable_default_filter_chain() = default_filter_chain_1;\n    *listener2.mutable_default_filter_chain() = default_filter_chain_2;\n    EXPECT_TRUE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n  }\n  {\n    listener1.clear_default_filter_chain();\n    listener2.clear_default_filter_chain();\n    const std::string filter_chain_matcher = R\"EOF(\n       matcher_tree:\n         input:\n           name: port\n           typed_config:\n             \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.DestinationPortInput\n         exact_match_map:\n           map:\n             \"10000\":\n               action:\n                 name: foo\n                 typed_config:\n                   \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n                   value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n    TestUtility::loadFromYaml(filter_chain_matcher, *listener2.mutable_filter_chain_matcher());\n    EXPECT_TRUE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n  }\n}\n\nTEST(ListenerMessageUtilTest, ListenerMessageHaveDifferentFilterChainsAreEquivalent) {\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener1;\n  listener1.set_name(\"common\");\n  auto add_filter_chain_1 = listener1.add_filter_chains();\n  add_filter_chain_1->set_name(\"127.0.0.1\");\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener2;\n  listener2.set_name(\"common\");\n  auto add_filter_chain_2 = listener2.add_filter_chains();\n  add_filter_chain_2->set_name(\"127.0.0.2\");\n\n  EXPECT_TRUE(Server::ListenerMessageUtil::filterChainOnlyChange(listener1, listener2));\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest, InvalidAddress) {\n  // Worker is not started yet.\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto;\n  Protobuf::TextFormat::ParseFromString(R\"EOF(\n    name: \"foo\"\n    address: {\n      socket_address: {\n        address: \"127.0.0.1.0\"\n        port_value: 1234\n      }\n    }\n    filter_chains: {}\n  )EOF\",\n                                        &listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_EQ(manager_->addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto, \"\", true).status().message(),\n            \"malformed IP address: 127.0.0.1.0\");\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest, TraditionalUpdateIfWorkerNotStarted) {\n  // Worker is not started yet.\n  auto listener_proto = createDefaultListener();\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, default_bind_type, _, 0));\n  addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_EQ(1u, manager_->listeners().size());\n\n  // Mutate the listener message as filter chain change only.\n  auto new_listener_proto = listener_proto;\n  new_listener_proto.mutable_filter_chains(0)\n      ->mutable_filter_chain_match()\n      ->mutable_destination_port()\n      ->set_value(9999);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo, onDestroy());\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_update1 = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, duplicate());\n  addOrUpdateListener(new_listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_foo_update1, onDestroy());\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n}\n\n// This case verifies that listeners that share port but do not share socket type (TCP vs. UDP)\n// do not share a listener.\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest, TraditionalUpdateIfDifferentSocketType) {\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  auto listener_proto = createDefaultListener();\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n\n  expectAddListener(listener_proto, listener_foo);\n\n  auto new_listener_proto = listener_proto;\n  new_listener_proto.mutable_address()->mutable_socket_address()->set_protocol(\n      envoy::config::core::v3::SocketAddress_Protocol::SocketAddress_Protocol_UDP);\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createDrainManager_(_));\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(new_listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': 1 filter chain(s) specified \"\n                            \"for connection-less UDP listener.\");\n\n  expectRemove(new_listener_proto, listener_foo, *listener_factory_.socket_);\n  EXPECT_EQ(0UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest,\n       DEPRECATED_FEATURE_TEST(TraditionalUpdateIfImplicitProxyProtocolChanges)) {\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  auto listener_proto = createDefaultListener();\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  expectAddListener(listener_proto, listener_foo);\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_update1 = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n\n  auto new_listener_proto = listener_proto;\n  new_listener_proto.mutable_filter_chains(0)->mutable_use_proxy_proto()->set_value(true);\n\n  auto duplicated_socket =\n      expectUpdateToThenDrain(new_listener_proto, listener_foo, *listener_factory_.socket_);\n  expectRemove(new_listener_proto, listener_foo_update1, *duplicated_socket);\n  EXPECT_EQ(0UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest, TraditionalUpdateOnZeroFilterChain) {\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  auto listener_proto = createDefaultListener();\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  expectAddListener(listener_proto, listener_foo);\n\n  auto new_listener_proto = listener_proto;\n  new_listener_proto.clear_filter_chains();\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, staticValidationVisitor()).Times(0);\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_, dynamicValidationVisitor());\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createDrainManager_(_));\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_MESSAGE(addOrUpdateListener(new_listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                            \"error adding listener '127.0.0.1:1234': no filter chains specified\");\n\n  expectRemove(listener_proto, listener_foo, *listener_factory_.socket_);\n  EXPECT_EQ(0UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest,\n       TraditionalUpdateIfListenerConfigHasUpdateOtherThanFilterChain) {\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n\n  auto listener_proto = createDefaultListener();\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n  expectAddListener(listener_proto, listener_foo);\n\n  ListenerHandle* listener_foo_update1 = expectListenerCreate(false, true);\n\n  auto new_listener_proto = listener_proto;\n  new_listener_proto.set_traffic_direction(::envoy::config::core::v3::TrafficDirection::INBOUND);\n  auto duplicated_socket =\n      expectUpdateToThenDrain(new_listener_proto, listener_foo, *listener_factory_.socket_);\n\n  expectRemove(new_listener_proto, listener_foo_update1, *duplicated_socket);\n\n  EXPECT_EQ(0UL, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(0, server_.stats_store_.counter(\"listener_manager.listener_in_place_updated\").value());\n}\n\n// This test verifies that on default initialization the UDP Packet Writer\n// is initialized in passthrough mode. (i.e. by using UdpDefaultWriter).\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, UdpDefaultWriterConfig) {\n  const envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\n    )EOF\");\n  addOrUpdateListener(listener);\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n  Network::SocketSharedPtr listen_socket =\n      manager_->listeners().front().get().listenSocketFactories()[0]->getListenSocket(0);\n  Network::UdpPacketWriterPtr udp_packet_writer =\n      manager_->listeners()\n          .front()\n          .get()\n          .udpListenerConfig()\n          ->packetWriterFactory()\n          .createUdpPacketWriter(listen_socket->ioHandle(),\n                                 manager_->listeners()[0].get().listenerScope());\n  EXPECT_FALSE(udp_packet_writer->isBatchMode());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, TcpBacklogCustomConfig) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\n    name: TcpBacklogConfigListener\n    address:\n      socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 1111 }\n    tcp_backlog_size: 100\n    filter_chains:\n    - filters:\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(listener_factory_, createListenSocket(_, _, _, _, _, _));\n  addOrUpdateListener(parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml));\n  EXPECT_EQ(1U, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_EQ(100U, manager_->listeners().back().get().tcpBacklogSize());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplTest, WorkersStartedCallbackCalled) {\n  InSequence s;\n\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, start(_, _));\n  EXPECT_CALL(callback_, Call());\n  ASSERT_TRUE(manager_->startWorkers(guard_dog_, callback_.AsStdFunction()).ok());\n}\n\nTEST(ListenerEnableReusePortTest, All) {\n  Server::MockInstance server;\n  const bool expected_reuse_port =\n      ListenerManagerImplTest::default_bind_type == ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort;\n\n  {\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config;\n    config.mutable_enable_reuse_port()->set_value(false);\n    config.mutable_address()->mutable_socket_address()->set_protocol(\n        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketAddress::TCP);\n    EXPECT_FALSE(\n        ListenerImpl::getReusePortOrDefault(server, config, Network::Socket::Type::Stream));\n  }\n  {\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config;\n    config.mutable_enable_reuse_port()->set_value(true);\n    config.mutable_address()->mutable_socket_address()->set_protocol(\n        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketAddress::TCP);\n    EXPECT_EQ(expected_reuse_port,\n              ListenerImpl::getReusePortOrDefault(server, config, Network::Socket::Type::Stream));\n  }\n  {\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config;\n    config.set_reuse_port(true);\n    config.mutable_address()->mutable_socket_address()->set_protocol(\n        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketAddress::TCP);\n    EXPECT_EQ(expected_reuse_port,\n              ListenerImpl::getReusePortOrDefault(server, config, Network::Socket::Type::Stream));\n  }\n  {\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config;\n    config.mutable_enable_reuse_port()->set_value(false);\n    config.set_reuse_port(true);\n    config.mutable_address()->mutable_socket_address()->set_protocol(\n        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketAddress::TCP);\n    EXPECT_FALSE(\n        ListenerImpl::getReusePortOrDefault(server, config, Network::Socket::Type::Stream));\n  }\n  {\n    envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener config;\n    config.mutable_address()->mutable_socket_address()->set_protocol(\n        envoy::config::core::v3::SocketAddress::TCP);\n    EXPECT_CALL(server, enableReusePortDefault());\n    EXPECT_EQ(expected_reuse_port,\n              ListenerImpl::getReusePortOrDefault(server, config, Network::Socket::Type::Stream));\n  }\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, InvalidExtendConnectionBalanceConfig) {\n// Envoy always use ExactBalance at WIN32, so ignore it.\n#ifndef WIN32\n  auto listener = createIPv4Listener(\"TCPListener\");\n  auto* connection_balance_config = listener.mutable_connection_balance_config();\n  auto* extend_balance_config = connection_balance_config->mutable_extend_balance();\n  extend_balance_config->set_name(\"envoy.network.connection_balance.test\");\n  extend_balance_config->mutable_typed_config()->set_type_url(\n      \"type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.test\");\n\n  auto listener_impl = *ListenerImpl::create(listener, \"version\", *manager_, \"foo\", true, false,\n                                             /*hash=*/static_cast<uint64_t>(0));\n  auto socket_factory = std::make_unique<Network::MockListenSocketFactory>();\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address(\n      new Network::Address::Ipv4Instance(\"192.168.0.1\", 80, nullptr));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*socket_factory, localAddress()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(address));\n  EXPECT_EQ(listener_impl->addSocketFactory(std::move(socket_factory)).message(),\n            \"Didn't find a registered implementation for type: 'google.protobuf.test'\");\n#endif\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest, EmptyConnectionBalanceConfig) {\n// Envoy always use ExactBalance at WIN32, so ignore it.\n#ifndef WIN32\n  auto listener = createIPv4Listener(\"TCPListener\");\n  listener.mutable_connection_balance_config();\n\n  auto listener_impl = *ListenerImpl::create(listener, \"version\", *manager_, \"foo\", true, false,\n                                             /*hash=*/static_cast<uint64_t>(0));\n  auto socket_factory = std::make_unique<Network::MockListenSocketFactory>();\n  Network::Address::InstanceConstSharedPtr address(\n      new Network::Address::Ipv4Instance(\"192.168.0.1\", 80, nullptr));\n  EXPECT_CALL(*socket_factory, localAddress()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(address));\n  EXPECT_EQ(listener_impl->addSocketFactory(std::move(socket_factory)).message(),\n            \"No valid balance type for connection balance\");\n#endif\n}\n\nINSTANTIATE_TEST_SUITE_P(Matcher, ListenerManagerImplTest, ::testing::Values(false));\nINSTANTIATE_TEST_SUITE_P(Matcher, ListenerManagerImplWithRealFiltersTest,\n                         ::testing::Values(false, true));\nINSTANTIATE_TEST_SUITE_P(Matcher, ListenerManagerImplForInPlaceFilterChainUpdateTest,\n                         ::testing::Values(false));\nINSTANTIATE_TEST_SUITE_P(Matcher, ListenerManagerImplWithDispatcherStatsTest,\n                         ::testing::Values(false));\n\n} // namespace\n} // namespace Server\n} // namespace Envoy\n",

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "#include \"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener.pb.h\"\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n#include \"source/common/quic/quic_server_transport_socket_factory.h\"\n#endif\n\n#include \"test/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl_test.h\"\n#include \"test/server/utility.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/threadsafe_singleton_injector.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/network/mocks.h\"\n#include \"test/integration/filters/test_listener_filter.h\"\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\nnamespace {\n\nusing ::testing::Return;\n\nclass MockSupportsUdpGso : public Api::OsSysCallsImpl {\npublic:\n  MOCK_METHOD(bool, supportsUdpGso, (), (const));\n};\n\nclass ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest : public ListenerManagerImplTest {\npublic:\n  size_t expectedNumSocketOptions() {\n    // SO_REUSEPORT, IP_PKTINFO and IP_MTU_DISCOVER/IP_DONTFRAG.\n    const size_t num_platform_independent_socket_options =\n        Runtime::runtimeFeatureEnabled(\"envoy.reloadable_features.udp_set_do_not_fragment\") ? 3 : 2;",
    "filePath": "/workspace/test/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl_quic_only_test.cc",
    "numLines": 30,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 813
  },
  "type": "text"
}
32. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/test/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl_quic_only_test.cc",

}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/test/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl_quic_only_test.cc",
  "newString": "ListenerOrchestrator",
  "oldString": "ListenerManagerImpl",
  "originalFile": "#include \"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener.pb.h\"\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n#include \"source/common/quic/quic_server_transport_socket_factory.h\"\n#endif\n\n#include \"test/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl_test.h\"\n#include \"test/server/utility.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/threadsafe_singleton_injector.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/network/mocks.h\"\n#include \"test/integration/filters/test_listener_filter.h\"\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace Server {\nnamespace {\n\nusing ::testing::Return;\n\nclass MockSupportsUdpGso : public Api::OsSysCallsImpl {\npublic:\n  MOCK_METHOD(bool, supportsUdpGso, (), (const));\n};\n\nclass ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest : public ListenerManagerImplTest {\npublic:\n  size_t expectedNumSocketOptions() {\n    // SO_REUSEPORT, IP_PKTINFO and IP_MTU_DISCOVER/IP_DONTFRAG.\n    const size_t num_platform_independent_socket_options =\n        Runtime::runtimeFeatureEnabled(\"envoy.reloadable_features.udp_set_do_not_fragment\") ? 3 : 2;\n    size_t num_platform_dependent_socket_options = 0;\n#ifdef SO_RXQ_OVFL\n    ++num_platform_dependent_socket_options;\n#endif\n    if (Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsUdpGro()) {\n      // SO_REUSEPORT\n      ++num_platform_dependent_socket_options;\n    }\n    return num_platform_dependent_socket_options + num_platform_independent_socket_options;\n  }\n\n  NiceMock<MockSupportsUdpGso> udp_gso_syscall_;\n  TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls{&udp_gso_syscall_};\n  Api::OsSysCallsImpl os_sys_calls_actual_;\n};\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\nstd::string getBasicConfig() {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters:\n  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n      codec_type: HTTP3\n      stat_prefix: hcm\n      route_config:\n        name: local_route\n      http_filters:\n        - name: envoy.filters.http.router\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.quic.v3.QuicDownstreamTransport\n      downstream_tls_context:\n        common_tls_context:\n          tls_certificates:\n          - certificate_chain:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n            private_key:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n          validation_context:\n            trusted_ca:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n            match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n            - matcher:\n                exact: localhost\n              san_type: URI\n            - matcher:\n                exact: 127.0.0.1\n              san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options: {}\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  return yaml;\n}\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryAndSslContext) {\n  std::string yaml = getBasicConfig();\n  if (use_matcher_) {\n    yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\nfilter_chain_matcher:\n  matcher_tree:\n    input:\n      name: transport\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.matching.common_inputs.network.v3.TransportProtocolInput\n    exact_match_map:\n      map:\n        \"quic\":\n          action:\n            name: foo\n            typed_config:\n              \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/google.protobuf.StringValue\n              value: foo\n    )EOF\";\n  }\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n  ON_CALL(udp_gso_syscall_, supportsUdpGso())\n      .WillByDefault(Return(os_sys_calls_actual_.supportsUdpGso()));\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  expectCreateListenSocket(envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND,\n                           expectedNumSocketOptions(),\n                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort);\n\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ ENVOY_IP_PKTINFO,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef SO_RXQ_OVFL\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_RXQ_OVFL,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_REUSEPORT,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef UDP_GRO\n  if (Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsUdpGro()) {\n    expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_UDP,\n                     /* expected_sockopt_name */ UDP_GRO,\n                     /* expected_value */ 1,\n                     /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n  }\n#endif\n\n#ifdef ENVOY_IP_DONTFRAG\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_DONTFRAG,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#else\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_MTU_DISCOVER,\n                   /* expected_value */ IP_PMTUDISC_DO,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n\n  addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_EQ(1u, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_FALSE(manager_->listeners()[0]\n                   .get()\n                   .udpListenerConfig()\n                   ->listenerFactory()\n                   .isTransportConnectionless());\n  Network::SocketSharedPtr listen_socket =\n      manager_->listeners().front().get().listenSocketFactories()[0]->getListenSocket(0);\n\n  Network::UdpPacketWriterPtr udp_packet_writer =\n      manager_->listeners()\n          .front()\n          .get()\n          .udpListenerConfig()\n          ->packetWriterFactory()\n          .createUdpPacketWriter(listen_socket->ioHandle(),\n                                 manager_->listeners()[0].get().listenerScope());\n  EXPECT_EQ(udp_packet_writer->isBatchMode(), Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsUdpGso());\n\n  // No filter chain found with non-matching transport protocol.\n  EXPECT_EQ(nullptr, findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"tls\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111));\n\n  auto filter_chain = findFilterChain(1234, \"127.0.0.1\", \"\", \"quic\", {}, \"8.8.8.8\", 111);\n  ASSERT_NE(nullptr, filter_chain);\n  auto& quic_socket_factory = dynamic_cast<const Quic::QuicServerTransportSocketFactory&>(\n      filter_chain->transportSocketFactory());\n  EXPECT_TRUE(quic_socket_factory.implementsSecureTransport());\n  auto [cert, key] = quic_socket_factory.getTlsCertificateAndKey(\"\", nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(cert != nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(key != nullptr);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(listener_factory_.socket_->socket_is_open_);\n\n  // Stop listening shouldn't close the socket.\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.dispatcher_, post(_)).WillOnce([](Event::PostCb callback) { callback(); });\n  EXPECT_CALL(*worker_, stopListener(_, _, _))\n      .WillOnce(Invoke([](Network::ListenerConfig&, const Network::ExtraShutdownListenerOptions&,\n                          std::function<void()> completion) { completion(); }));\n  manager_->stopListeners(ListenerManager::StopListenersType::All, {});\n  EXPECT_CALL(*listener_factory_.socket_, close()).Times(0u);\n  EXPECT_TRUE(listener_factory_.socket_->socket_is_open_);\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicWriterFromConfig) {\n  std::string yaml = getBasicConfig();\n  yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\n  udp_packet_packet_writer_config:\n    name: envoy.udp_packet_writer.default\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.udp_packet_writer.v3.UdpDefaultWriterFactory\n  )EOF\";\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n  // Configure GSO support but later verify that the default writer is used instead.\n  ON_CALL(udp_gso_syscall_, supportsUdpGso()).WillByDefault(Return(true));\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  expectCreateListenSocket(envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND,\n                           expectedNumSocketOptions(),\n                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort);\n\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ ENVOY_IP_PKTINFO,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef SO_RXQ_OVFL\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_RXQ_OVFL,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_REUSEPORT,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef UDP_GRO\n  if (Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsUdpGro()) {\n    expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_UDP,\n                     /* expected_sockopt_name */ UDP_GRO,\n                     /* expected_value */ 1,\n                     /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n  }\n#endif\n\n#ifdef ENVOY_IP_DONTFRAG\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_DONTFRAG,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#else\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_MTU_DISCOVER,\n                   /* expected_value */ IP_PMTUDISC_DO,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n\n  addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_EQ(1u, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_FALSE(manager_->listeners()[0]\n                   .get()\n                   .udpListenerConfig()\n                   ->listenerFactory()\n                   .isTransportConnectionless());\n  Network::SocketSharedPtr listen_socket =\n      manager_->listeners().front().get().listenSocketFactories()[0]->getListenSocket(0);\n\n  Network::UdpPacketWriterFactory& udp_packet_writer_factory =\n      manager_->listeners().front().get().udpListenerConfig()->packetWriterFactory();\n  Network::UdpPacketWriterPtr udp_packet_writer = udp_packet_writer_factory.createUdpPacketWriter(\n      listen_socket->ioHandle(), manager_->listeners()[0].get().listenerScope());\n  // Even though GSO is enabled, the default writer should be used.\n  EXPECT_EQ(false, udp_packet_writer->isBatchMode());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryWithExplictConnectionIdConfig) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters:\n  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n      codec_type: HTTP3\n      stat_prefix: hcm\n      route_config:\n        name: local_route\n      http_filters:\n        - name: envoy.filters.http.router\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.quic.v3.QuicDownstreamTransport\n      downstream_tls_context:\n        common_tls_context:\n          tls_certificates:\n          - certificate_chain:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n            private_key:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n          validation_context:\n            trusted_ca:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n            match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n            - matcher:\n                exact: localhost\n              san_type: URI\n            - matcher:\n                exact: 127.0.0.1\n              san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options:\n    connection_id_generator_config:\n      name: envoy.quic.deterministic_connection_id_generator\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.quic.connection_id_generator.v3.DeterministicConnectionIdGeneratorConfig\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n  // Configure GSO support but later verify that the default writer is used instead.\n  ON_CALL(udp_gso_syscall_, supportsUdpGso()).WillByDefault(Return(true));\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  expectCreateListenSocket(envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND,\n                           expectedNumSocketOptions(),\n                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort);\n\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ ENVOY_IP_PKTINFO,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef SO_RXQ_OVFL\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_RXQ_OVFL,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_REUSEPORT,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef UDP_GRO\n  if (Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsUdpGro()) {\n    expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_UDP,\n                     /* expected_sockopt_name */ UDP_GRO,\n                     /* expected_value */ 1,\n                     /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n  }\n#endif\n\n#ifdef ENVOY_IP_DONTFRAG\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_DONTFRAG,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#else\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_MTU_DISCOVER,\n                   /* expected_value */ IP_PMTUDISC_DO,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n\n  addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_EQ(1u, manager_->listeners().size());\n  EXPECT_FALSE(manager_->listeners()[0]\n                   .get()\n                   .udpListenerConfig()\n                   ->listenerFactory()\n                   .isTransportConnectionless());\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFilterFromConfig) {\n  std::string yaml = getBasicConfig();\n  yaml = yaml + R\"EOF(\nlistener_filters:\n- name: envoy.filters.quic_listener.test\n  typed_config:\n    \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestQuicListenerFilterConfig\n    added_value: xyz\n  )EOF\";\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n  // Configure GSO support but later verify that the default writer is used instead.\n  ON_CALL(udp_gso_syscall_, supportsUdpGso()).WillByDefault(Return(true));\n  EXPECT_CALL(server_.api_.random_, uuid());\n  expectCreateListenSocket(envoy::config::core::v3::SocketOption::STATE_PREBIND,\n                           expectedNumSocketOptions(),\n                           ListenerComponentFactory::BindType::ReusePort);\n\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ ENVOY_IP_PKTINFO,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef SO_RXQ_OVFL\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_RXQ_OVFL,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_SOCKET,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ SO_REUSEPORT,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#ifdef UDP_GRO\n  if (Api::OsSysCallsSingleton::get().supportsUdpGro()) {\n    expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ SOL_UDP,\n                     /* expected_sockopt_name */ UDP_GRO,\n                     /* expected_value */ 1,\n                     /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n  }\n#endif\n\n#ifdef ENVOY_IP_DONTFRAG\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_DONTFRAG,\n                   /* expected_value */ 1,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#else\n  expectSetsockopt(/* expected_sockopt_level */ IPPROTO_IP,\n                   /* expected_sockopt_name */ IP_MTU_DISCOVER,\n                   /* expected_value */ IP_PMTUDISC_DO,\n                   /* expected_num_calls */ 1);\n#endif\n\n  addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto);\n  EXPECT_EQ(1u, manager_->listeners().size());\n  // Verify that the right filter chain type is installed.\n  Network::MockQuicListenerFilterManager filter_manager;\n  Network::QuicListenerFilterPtr listener_filter;\n  EXPECT_CALL(filter_manager, addFilter(_, _))\n      .WillOnce([&listener_filter](const Network::ListenerFilterMatcherSharedPtr&,\n                                   Network::QuicListenerFilterPtr&& filter) {\n        listener_filter = std::move(filter);\n      });\n  manager_->listeners()[0].get().filterChainFactory().createQuicListenerFilterChain(filter_manager);\n  ASSERT_NE(nullptr, listener_filter);\n  Network::MockListenerFilterCallbacks callbacks;\n  EXPECT_CALL(callbacks, filterState()).Times(2);\n  EXPECT_CALL(callbacks, dispatcher()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(server_.dispatcher_));\n  listener_filter->onAccept(callbacks);\n  auto* added_filter_state =\n      callbacks.filter_state_.getDataReadOnly<TestQuicListenerFilter::TestStringFilterState>(\n          TestQuicListenerFilter::TestStringFilterState::key());\n  ASSERT_NE(nullptr, added_filter_state);\n  EXPECT_EQ(\"xyz\", added_filter_state->asString());\n}\n\n#endif\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryWithWrongTransportSocket) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters: []\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.DownstreamTlsContext\n      common_tls_context:\n        tls_certificates:\n        - certificate_chain:\n            filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n          private_key:\n            filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n        validation_context:\n          trusted_ca:\n            filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n          match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n          - matcher:\n              exact: localhost\n            san_type: URI\n          - matcher:\n              exact: 127.0.0.1\n            san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options: {}\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"wrong transport socket config specified for quic transport socket\");\n#else\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"QUIC is configured but not enabled in the build.\");\n#endif\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryWithWrongCodec) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters: []\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.quic.v3.QuicDownstreamTransport\n      downstream_tls_context:\n        common_tls_context:\n          tls_certificates:\n          - certificate_chain:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n            private_key:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n          validation_context:\n            trusted_ca:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n            match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n            - matcher:\n                exact: localhost\n              san_type: URI\n            - matcher:\n                exact: 127.0.0.1\n              san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options: {}\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"error building network filter chain for quic listener: requires \"\n                          \"http_connection_manager filter to be last in the chain.\");\n#else\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"QUIC is configured but not enabled in the build.\");\n#endif\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryWithNetworkFilterAfterHcm) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters:\n  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n      codec_type: HTTP3\n      stat_prefix: hcm\n      route_config:\n        name: local_route\n      http_filters:\n        - name: envoy.filters.http.router\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router\n  - name: envoy.test.test_network_filter\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/test.integration.filters.TestNetworkFilterConfig\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.quic.v3.QuicDownstreamTransport\n      downstream_tls_context:\n        common_tls_context:\n          tls_certificates:\n          - certificate_chain:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n            private_key:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n          validation_context:\n            trusted_ca:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n            match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n            - matcher:\n                exact: localhost\n              san_type: URI\n            - matcher:\n                exact: 127.0.0.1\n              san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options: {}\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"error building network filter chain for quic listener: requires \"\n                          \"http_connection_manager filter to be last in the chain.\");\n#else\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"QUIC is configured but not enabled in the build.\");\n#endif\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryWithConnectionBalencer) {\n  const std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 127.0.0.1\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters:\n  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n      codec_type: HTTP3\n      stat_prefix: hcm\n      route_config:\n        name: local_route\n      http_filters:\n        - name: envoy.filters.http.router\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.quic.v3.QuicDownstreamTransport\n      downstream_tls_context:\n        common_tls_context:\n          tls_certificates:\n          - certificate_chain:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n            private_key:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n          validation_context:\n            trusted_ca:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n            match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n            - matcher:\n                exact: localhost\n              san_type: URI\n            - matcher:\n                exact: 127.0.0.1\n              san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options: {}\nconnection_balance_config:\n  exact_balance: {}\n  )EOF\",\n                                                       Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"connection_balance_config is configured for QUIC listener which doesn't \"\n                          \"work with connection balancer.\");\n#else\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"QUIC is configured but not enabled in the build.\");\n#endif\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryWithBadServerPreferredV4Address) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 0.0.0.0\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters:\n  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n      codec_type: HTTP3\n      stat_prefix: hcm\n      route_config:\n        name: local_route\n      http_filters:\n        - name: envoy.filters.http.router\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.quic.v3.QuicDownstreamTransport\n      downstream_tls_context:\n        common_tls_context:\n          tls_certificates:\n          - certificate_chain:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n            private_key:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n          validation_context:\n            trusted_ca:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n            match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n            - matcher:\n                exact: localhost\n              san_type: URI\n            - matcher:\n                exact: 127.0.0.1\n              san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options:\n    server_preferred_address_config:\n      name: quic.server_preferred_address.fixed\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.quic.server_preferred_address.v3.FixedServerPreferredAddressConfig\n        ipv4_address: \"bad.v4.address\"\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"bad v4 server preferred address\");\n#else\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"QUIC is configured but not enabled in the build.\");\n#endif\n}\n\nTEST_P(ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, QuicListenerFactoryWithBadServerPreferredV6Address) {\n  std::string yaml = TestEnvironment::substitute(R\"EOF(\naddress:\n  socket_address:\n    address: 0.0.0.0\n    protocol: UDP\n    port_value: 1234\nfilter_chains:\n- filter_chain_match:\n    transport_protocol: \"quic\"\n  name: foo\n  filters:\n  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager\n      codec_type: HTTP3\n      stat_prefix: hcm\n      route_config:\n        name: local_route\n      http_filters:\n        - name: envoy.filters.http.router\n          typed_config:\n            \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router\n  transport_socket:\n    name: envoy.transport_sockets.quic\n    typed_config:\n      \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.quic.v3.QuicDownstreamTransport\n      downstream_tls_context:\n        common_tls_context:\n          tls_certificates:\n          - certificate_chain:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_cert.pem\"\n            private_key:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/san_uri_key.pem\"\n          validation_context:\n            trusted_ca:\n              filename: \"{{ test_rundir }}/test/common/tls/test_data/ca_cert.pem\"\n            match_typed_subject_alt_names:\n            - matcher:\n                exact: localhost\n              san_type: URI\n            - matcher:\n                exact: 127.0.0.1\n              san_type: IP_ADDRESS\nudp_listener_config:\n  quic_options:\n    server_preferred_address_config:\n      name: quic.server_preferred_address.fixed\n      typed_config:\n        \"@type\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.quic.server_preferred_address.v3.FixedServerPreferredAddressConfig\n        ipv6_address: \"bad.v6.address\"\n  )EOF\",\n                                                 Network::Address::IpVersion::v4);\n  envoy::config::listener::v3::Listener listener_proto = parseListenerFromV3Yaml(yaml);\n\n#if defined(ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC)\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"bad v6 server preferred address\");\n#else\n  EXPECT_THROW_WITH_REGEX(addOrUpdateListener(listener_proto), EnvoyException,\n                          \"QUIC is configured but not enabled in the build.\");\n#endif\n}\n\nINSTANTIATE_TEST_SUITE_P(Matcher, ListenerManagerImplQuicOnlyTest, ::testing::Values(false, true));\n\n} // namespace\n} // namespace Server\n} // namespace Envoy\n",

  "originalFile": "#include <cstdint>\n#include <memory>\n#include <string>\n\n#include \"envoy/common/platform.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/bootstrap/v3/bootstrap.pb.h\"\n#include \"envoy/config/listener/v3/listener_components.pb.h\"\n\n#include \"source/common/api/os_sys_calls_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/common/fmt.h\"\n#include \"source/common/listener_manager/listener_manager_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/common/protobuf/utility.h\"\n#include \"source/common/runtime/runtime_features.h\"\n#include \"source/server/config_validation/server.h\"\n#include \"source/server/configuration_impl.h\"\n#include \"source/server/options_impl.h\"\n\n#include \"test/integration/server.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/instance.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/listener_component_factory.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/worker.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/server/worker_factory.h\"\n#include \"test/mocks/ssl/mocks.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/simulated_time_system.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/threadsafe_singleton_injector.h\"\n#include \"test/test_common/utility.h\"\n\n#include \"gmock/gmock.h\"\n#include \"gtest/gtest.h\"\n\nusing testing::_;\nusing testing::AtLeast;\nusing testing::Invoke;\nusing testing::NiceMock;\nusing testing::Return;\nusing testing::ReturnRef;\n\nnamespace Envoy {\nnamespace ConfigTest {\nnamespace {\n\n// asConfigYaml returns a new config that empties the configPath() and populates configYaml()\nOptionsImplBase asConfigYaml(const OptionsImplBase& src, Api::Api& api) {\n  return Envoy::Server::createTestOptionsImpl(\n      \"\", api.fileSystem().fileReadToEnd(src.configPath()).value(), src.localAddressIpVersion());\n}\n\nstatic std::vector<absl::string_view> unsuported_win32_configs = {\n#if defined(WIN32)\n    \"rbac_envoy.yaml\",\n#endif\n#if defined(WIN32) && !defined(SO_ORIGINAL_DST)\n    \"configs_original-dst-cluster_proxy_config.yaml\"\n#endif\n};\n\n} // namespace\n\nclass ConfigTest {\npublic:\n  ConfigTest(OptionsImplBase& options)\n      : api_(Api::createApiForTest(time_system_)), options_(options) {\n    ON_CALL(*server_.server_factory_context_, api()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(server_.api_));\n    ON_CALL(server_, options()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(options_));\n    ON_CALL(server_, sslContextManager()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(ssl_context_manager_));\n    ON_CALL(server_.api_, fileSystem()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(file_system_));\n    ON_CALL(server_.api_, randomGenerator()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(random_));\n    ON_CALL(server_.api_, threadFactory()).WillByDefault(Invoke([&]() -> Thread::ThreadFactory& {\n      return api_->threadFactory();\n    }));\n    ON_CALL(file_system_, fileReadToEnd(_))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke([&](const std::string& file) -> absl::StatusOr<std::string> {\n          return api_->fileSystem().fileReadToEnd(file);\n        }));\n    ON_CALL(os_sys_calls_, close(_)).WillByDefault(Return(Api::SysCallIntResult{0, 0}));\n    EXPECT_CALL(os_sys_calls_, getaddrinfo(_, _, _, _))\n        .WillRepeatedly(Invoke([&](const char* node, const char* service,\n                                   const struct addrinfo* hints, struct addrinfo** res) {\n          Api::OsSysCallsImpl real;\n          return real.getaddrinfo(node, service, hints, res);\n        }));\n\n    // Here we setup runtime to mimic the actual deprecated feature list used in the\n    // production code. Note that this test is actually more strict than production because\n    // in production runtime is not setup until after the bootstrap config is loaded. This seems\n    // better for configuration tests.\n    ON_CALL(server_.runtime_loader_.snapshot_, deprecatedFeatureEnabled(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke([](absl::string_view, bool default_value) { return default_value; }));\n\n    ON_CALL(server_.runtime_loader_, threadsafeSnapshot()).WillByDefault(Invoke([this]() {\n      return snapshot_;\n    }));\n\n    // For configuration/example tests we don't fail if WIP APIs are used.\n    EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_.static_validation_visitor_, onWorkInProgress(_))\n        .Times(AtLeast(0));\n    EXPECT_CALL(server_.validation_context_.dynamic_validation_visitor_, onWorkInProgress(_))\n        .Times(AtLeast(0));\n\n    envoy::config::bootstrap::v3::Bootstrap bootstrap;\n    EXPECT_TRUE(Server::InstanceUtil::loadBootstrapConfig(\n                    bootstrap, options_,\n                    server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor(), *api_)\n                    .ok());\n    absl::Status creation_status;\n    Server::Configuration::InitialImpl initial_config(bootstrap, creation_status);\n    THROW_IF_NOT_OK_REF(creation_status);\n    Server::Configuration::MainImpl main_config;\n\n    // Emulate main implementation of initializing bootstrap extensions.\n    std::vector<Server::BootstrapExtensionPtr> bootstrap_extensions;\n    for (const auto& bootstrap_extension : bootstrap.bootstrap_extensions()) {\n      auto& factory =\n          Config::Utility::getAndCheckFactory<Server::Configuration::BootstrapExtensionFactory>(\n              bootstrap_extension);\n      auto config = Config::Utility::translateAnyToFactoryConfig(\n          bootstrap_extension.typed_config(),\n          server_.messageValidationContext().staticValidationVisitor(), factory);\n      bootstrap_extensions.push_back(\n          factory.createBootstrapExtension(*config, server_factory_context_));\n    }\n\n    cluster_manager_factory_ = std::make_unique<Upstream::ValidationClusterManagerFactory>(\n        *server_.server_factory_context_, server_.stats(), server_.threadLocal(),\n        server_.httpContext(),\n        [this]() -> Network::DnsResolverSharedPtr { return this->server_.dnsResolver(); },\n        ssl_context_manager_, server_.secretManager(), server_.quic_stat_names_, server_);\n\n    ON_CALL(server_, clusterManager()).WillByDefault(Invoke([&]() -> Upstream::ClusterManager& {\n      return *main_config.clusterManager();\n    }));\n    ON_CALL(server_, listenerManager()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(listener_manager_));\n    ON_CALL(component_factory_, createNetworkFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke(\n            [&](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::Filter>& filters,\n                Server::Configuration::FilterChainFactoryContext& context) {\n              return Server::ProdListenerComponentFactory::createNetworkFilterFactoryListImpl(\n                  filters, context, network_config_provider_manager_);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(component_factory_, getTcpListenerConfigProviderManager())\n        .WillByDefault(Return(&tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_));\n    ON_CALL(component_factory_, createListenerFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke(\n            [&](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>&\n                    filters,\n                Server::Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context) {\n              return Server::ProdListenerComponentFactory::createListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\n                  filters, context, *component_factory_.getTcpListenerConfigProviderManager());\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(component_factory_, createUdpListenerFilterFactoryList(_, _))\n        .WillByDefault(Invoke(\n            [&](const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::listener::v3::ListenerFilter>&\n                    filters,\n                Server::Configuration::ListenerFactoryContext& context) {\n              return Server::ProdListenerComponentFactory::createUdpListenerFilterFactoryListImpl(\n                  filters, context);\n            }));\n    ON_CALL(server_, serverFactoryContext()).WillByDefault(ReturnRef(server_factory_context_));\n\n    try {\n      THROW_IF_NOT_OK(main_config.initialize(bootstrap, server_, *cluster_manager_factory_));\n    } catch (const EnvoyException& ex) {\n      ADD_FAILURE() << fmt::format(\"'{}' config failed. Error: {}\", options_.configPath(),\n                                   ex.what());\n    }\n\n    server_.thread_local_.shutdownThread();\n  }\n\n  Event::SimulatedTimeSystem time_system_;\n  Api::ApiPtr api_;\n  NiceMock<Server::MockInstance> server_;\n  Server::ServerFactoryContextImpl server_factory_context_{server_};\n  NiceMock<Ssl::MockContextManager> ssl_context_manager_;\n  OptionsImplBase& options_;\n  std::unique_ptr<Upstream::ProdClusterManagerFactory> cluster_manager_factory_;\n  std::unique_ptr<NiceMock<Server::MockListenerComponentFactory>> component_factory_ptr_{\n      std::make_unique<NiceMock<Server::MockListenerComponentFactory>>()};\n  NiceMock<Server::MockListenerComponentFactory>& component_factory_{*component_factory_ptr_};\n  NiceMock<Server::MockWorkerFactory> worker_factory_;\n  Server::ListenerManagerImpl listener_manager_{server_, std::move(component_factory_ptr_),\n                                                worker_factory_, false, server_.quic_stat_names_};\n  Random::RandomGeneratorImpl random_;\n  std::shared_ptr<Runtime::MockSnapshot> snapshot_{\n      std::make_shared<NiceMock<Runtime::MockSnapshot>>()};\n  NiceMock<Api::MockOsSysCalls> os_sys_calls_;\n  TestThreadsafeSingletonInjector<Api::OsSysCallsImpl> os_calls{&os_sys_calls_};\n  NiceMock<Filesystem::MockInstance> file_system_;\n  Filter::NetworkFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl network_config_provider_manager_;\n  Filter::TcpListenerFilterConfigProviderManagerImpl tcp_listener_config_provider_manager_;\n};\n\nvoid testMerge() {\n  Api::ApiPtr api = Api::createApiForTest();\n  const std::string overlay = R\"EOF(\n        {\n          admin: {\n            \"address\": {\n              \"socket_address\": {\n                \"address\": \"1.2.3.4\",\n                \"port_value\": 5678\n              }\n            }\n          },\n          static_resources: {\n            clusters: [\n              {\n                name: 'foo'\n              }\n            ]\n          }\n        })EOF\";\n  OptionsImplBase options(Server::createTestOptionsImpl(\"envoyproxy_io_proxy.yaml\", overlay,\n                                                        Network::Address::IpVersion::v6));\n  envoy::config::bootstrap::v3::Bootstrap bootstrap;\n  ASSERT_TRUE(Server::InstanceUtil::loadBootstrapConfig(\n                  bootstrap, options, ProtobufMessage::getStrictValidationVisitor(), *api)\n                  .ok());\n  EXPECT_EQ(2, bootstrap.static_resources().clusters_size());\n}\n\nuint32_t run(const std::string& directory) {\n  uint32_t num_tested = 0;\n  Api::ApiPtr api = Api::createApiForTest();\n  for (const std::string& filename : TestUtility::listFiles(directory, false)) {\n#ifndef ENVOY_ENABLE_QUIC\n    if (filename.find(\"http3\") != std::string::npos) {\n      ENVOY_LOG_MISC(info, \"Skipping HTTP/3 config {}.\\n\", filename);\n      num_tested++;\n      continue;\n    }\n#endif\n\n    ENVOY_LOG_MISC(info, \"testing {}.\\n\", filename);\n    if (std::find_if(unsuported_win32_configs.begin(), unsuported_win32_configs.end(),\n                     [filename](const absl::string_view& s) {\n                       return filename.find(std::string(s)) != std::string::npos;\n                     }) == unsuported_win32_configs.end()) {\n      OptionsImplBase options(\n          Envoy::Server::createTestOptionsImpl(filename, \"\", Network::Address::IpVersion::v6));\n      ConfigTest test1(options);\n      envoy::config::bootstrap::v3::Bootstrap bootstrap;\n      EXPECT_TRUE(Server::InstanceUtil::loadBootstrapConfig(\n                      bootstrap, options, ProtobufMessage::getStrictValidationVisitor(), *api)\n                      .ok());\n      ENVOY_LOG_MISC(info, \"testing {} as yaml.\", filename);\n      OptionsImplBase config = asConfigYaml(options, *api);\n      ConfigTest test2(config);\n    }\n    num_tested++;\n  }\n  return num_tested;\n}\n} // namespace ConfigTest\n} // namespace Envoy\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
